4353584759,https://it.linkedin.com/jobs/view/graduate-program-data-science-analytics-italy-at-nexi-italy-4353584759?position=37&pageNum=0&refId=fQ3hd0f2xk3SSqpZ69m3LA%3D%3D&trackingId=Mv6u1oP5Ki7turOr9iGRJQ%3D%3D,Graduate Program Data Science & Analytics - Italy,Nexi Italy,"Milan, Lombardy, Italy","Job Description
Are you looking to kick off your career journey?
Do you like the idea of joining the European PayTech?
If so, you are at the right place!

Our Graduate Program offers you the chance to create your unique career path within our diverse international team, operating in more than 25 countries. Rotate among different departments, learn from experienced professionals, and make a difference by working on real business cases.
About The Program
Our Graduate Program is more than a learning path, it's a journey where you will work on real business cases and have a direct impact on business results.
What Can You Expect?
Career Path: Start with a permanent contract from day one. Over 12 months, experience two rotations across departments and transition into a landing role where you can continue to grow.

Training & Development: Receive a well-structured, dedicated Project Management training program, tailored to strengthen your ability to lead projects and deliver results. Plus, gain access to a wide range of learning opportunities through our Digital PayTech University, empowering you to continuously build your skills and expand your knowledge.
Impact & Networking: Contribute to real business solutions and expand your network by working alongside talented colleagues and senior leaders from across Europe.
Who are We Looking For?
If this sounds like you, we encourage you to apply:

You have graduated within the past 12 months or will graduate within the next 6 months with a master’s degree in Engineering, STEM disciplines, Economics, Business, Law, or related fields, and are available to work full-time.
You are fluent in English and Italian.
You bring international experience, whether through study, work abroad, or collaboration in a global environment.
You are a career starter with no more than one year of professional experience.
You have the legal right to work in Italy (e.g., residency, visa).
You are committed, curious, and eager to take ownership of projects while thriving in a team environment.
You see formal training as just the beginning and aim to make a difference in everything you do.
Diversity, Equity and Inclusion

We are committed to building a diverse culture where talents from all walks of life feel they truly belong. By applying to our Graduate Program, you are one step closer to joining us. Next starts with you, everyday.
Apply Now!
Don't miss out on this amazing opportunity. Apply today and discover what's in it for you!
Please ensure both your CV and all answers in the application form are completed in English.
About Us
Are you interested in joining one of Europe's leading PayTech companies?
Do you want to be part of a diverse team, collaborating with colleagues from across Europe? If so, you're in the right place!
About The Team
We are the result of merging Nexi, Nets, and Sia, with a presence in over 25 countries. With over 80 years of experience, we offer plenty of opportunities for personal and professional growth

At Nexi, we learn, adapt, and think like entrepreneurs. Discover more about our culture by visiting this page: https://www.nexigroup.com/en/people/life-at-nexi/overview/?utm_source=career-platform&utm_medium=job-openings&utm_content=about-the-team

4413534454,https://it.linkedin.com/jobs/view/fraud-data-analyst-barcelona-at-satispay-4413534454?position=38&pageNum=0&refId=fQ3hd0f2xk3SSqpZ69m3LA%3D%3D&trackingId=Rvx8ax4E3SwXweBGR8K9pw%3D%3D,Fraud Data Analyst - Barcelona,Satispay,"Milan, Lombardy, Italy","Please note that this opportunity requires relocation to our Barcelona office.
About Us

Satispay began by rethinking the simple act of a payment to remove the friction from our daily routines. But we didn't stop there. Today, we are building a complete financial platform designed to empower people and concretely improve their lives.
By giving our 6 million users a clear, open path to pay, save, and invest, we are evolving into the definitive destination for every financial need.
What You'll Be Doing
As our Fraud Data Analyst, you'll be the person who secures the future of digital payments by architecting sophisticated real-time defense strategies.
Here's What Your Day-to-day Will Look Like

Architect Real-Time Strategies – You will be responsible for our real-time decisioning engine, designing and deploying logic that combines ML scores with velocity features to make millisecond decisions.
Precision Rule Development – Translate complex fraud patterns into high-performing rules, optimizing the balance between False Positive Rates (FPR) and Gross Fraud Loss.
Deconstruct Payment Fraud – Proactively hunt for emerging schemes (ATO, social engineering) and turn these insights into end-to-end mitigation strategies.
Optimize the Decisioning Stack – Partner with Product and Engineering to define analytical requirements for new features and third-party data signals.
Calibrate ML & Heuristics – Work with Data Science to operationalize machine learning models, determining how to best ""wrap"" model scores with heuristic rules.
Champion Frictionless UX – Analyze security measures to identify unnecessary hurdles, designing dynamic friction strategies for a seamless user experience.
Strategic Performance Reporting – Monitor rule efficacy and portfolio health, presenting data-driven recommendations to senior leadership to evolve our risk appetite.

Expect challenges, collaboration, and the freedom to bring your ideas to life in a fast-moving and supportive environment. Things change quickly here, so be ready to adapt, take initiative, and shape your role as we grow.
Who We're Looking For
We need a problem-solver who loves teamwork and gets things done. If you're curious and ready for real ownership, you'll fit in! Does this sound like you?
Experience – You have between 3 and 7 years of professional experience, specifically within the risk, payments, or credit sectors.
Technical Proficiency – You are highly skilled in SQL and Python for data analysis and strategy development.
Domain Expertise – You have a solid understanding of payment fraud dynamics and experience working with real-time decisioning environments.
Communication – You possess excellent communication skills and are fluent in English.
Nice to Have – Experience with Machine Learning, Data Science, PySpark, or GraphQL knowledge is a significant plus.
CareAbout: how we support your impact
About

We move fast, and evolution never stops. It's a fun ride, but it can be challenging. To make sure our people truly thrive, we're committed to making their lives easier, both in the office and out in the world. That's why we created CareAbout:
❤️ Health (Private insurance for you and your family, psychological support with Serenis, mental health workshops)
💰 Financial resources (Stock Option Plan, Meal vouchers, Relocation support if you're moving countries)
⚙️ Growth and development (Professional development programs, Internal mobility, Language courses with Preply)
🌱 Flexibility (Unlimited PTO, Hybrid working policy*, Flexible working hours)
👨‍👩‍👧 Family (Enhanced parental leave, Additional leave for child sickness)
We embrace three days per week in-office (Tuesday and Thursday + 1 of your choice), with the option to request extra remote time.
Equal opportunity employer

At Satispay, we're proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and inclusion, welcoming individuals of all backgrounds. This opportunity is open to everyone, regardless - for instance - of race, colour, religion, sex, gender identity, sexual orientation, and national origin. Join us in a workplace where everyone belongs!
Learn More About Us
Our values and pillars aren't just fancy words on a page - they really shape everything we do. Explore them here.

4415564257,https://it.linkedin.com/jobs/view/data-analyst-procurement-italy-at-ion-4415564257?position=40&pageNum=0&refId=fQ3hd0f2xk3SSqpZ69m3LA%3D%3D&trackingId=0qni6KmPNCatwtQh3JwINg%3D%3D,"Data Analyst - Procurement, Italy",ION,"Milan, Lombardy, Italy","About Us

We are a community of visionary innovators, dedicated to providing pioneering software and consultancy services to financial institutions, trading firms, central banks, governments, and corporations around the world. We strive to simplify the way people work. We do that by providing workflow and process automation software, as well as providing real-time data and business intelligence to help people make better decisions. We are 13,000+ employees, we operate globally with 80+ global offices, and we serve over 4,800+ customers worldwide.

We are looking for a talented and motivated Data Analyst - Procurement to join the Procurement function and support data-driven decision making, acting as a key analytical partner for Procurement stakeholders, with a strong focus on data analysis, operational intelligence, and reporting.

The role requires a highly analytical professional capable of working closely with the Procurement team on procurement and vendor-related datasets, delivering insights, and contributing to performance monitoring, governance, and process optimization.

The successful candidate will play a key role in transforming procurement and operational data into actionable insights, supporting decision-making, efficiency, and continuous improvement across procurement processes and the vendor lifecycle.
Learn more at www.iongroup.com.
Your Role
Your key duties and responsibilities
Act as a key data analysis reference within the Procurement function, supporting stakeholders in monitoring performance and driving insights
Perform advanced data analysis on procurement and vendor-related datasets, identifying trends, inconsistencies, risks, and improvement opportunities
Analyze data from key source systems and contribute to the development of structured data models to improve usability, traceability, and reporting accuracy
Support Procurement stakeholders by transforming data into meaningful insights and decision-support reporting
Design, maintain, and improve reporting frameworks, dashboards, KPIs, and data quality controls to support procurement performance and governance
Monitor procurement KPIs and vendor performance metrics, identifying areas for optimization
Ensure data quality, integrity, and consistency across multiple enterprise systems (e.g. ERP, procurement tools, vendor management platforms)
Support business analysis and data-related initiatives across Procurement, Finance, and IT systems
Collaborate closely with Procurement stakeholders and cross-functionally with Finance, Risk, Compliance, IT, and Data teams
Contribute to process improvements by leveraging data insights and supporting automation initiatives within Procurement
Support audits and reporting needs related to procurement data, ensuring accuracy and traceability
Your Skills, Experience, And Qualifications Required
Master’s degree in Economics, Engineering, Data Analytics, Business Analytics, Statistics, or a related field
2-5 years of experience in data analysis, reporting, or business intelligence roles
Strong analytical mindset with proven experience in data analysis, KPI monitoring, and reporting
Experience working with structured datasets and business systems (e.g. ERP)
Advanced Excel skills and strong proficiency in data manipulation and reporting
column2: Power BI or similar BI platforms strongly preferred

About Us

We are a community of visionary innovators, dedicated to providing pioneering software and consultancy services to financial institutions, trading firms, central banks, governments, and corporations around the world. We strive to simplify the way people work. We do that by providing workflow and process automation software, as well as providing real-time data and business intelligence to help people make better decisions. We are 13,000+ employees, we operate globally with 80+ global offices, and we serve over 4,800+ customers worldwide.

We are looking for a talented and motivated Data Analyst - Procurement to join the Procurement function and support data-driven decision making, acting as a key analytical partner for Procurement stakeholders, with a strong focus on data analysis, operational intelligence, and reporting.

The role requires a highly analytical professional capable of working closely with the Procurement team on procurement and vendor-related datasets, delivering insights, and contributing to performance monitoring, governance, and process optimization.

The successful candidate will play a key role in transforming procurement and operational data into actionable insights, supporting decision-making, efficiency, and continuous improvement across procurement processes and the vendor lifecycle.

Learn more at www.iongroup.com.

Your Role

Your key duties and responsibilities

  • Act as a key data analysis reference within the Procurement function, supporting stakeholders in monitoring performance and driving insights
  • Perform advanced data analysis on procurement and vendor-related datasets, identifying trends, inconsistencies, risks, and improvement opportunities
  • Analyze data from key source systems and contribute to the development of structured data models to improve usability, traceability, and reporting accuracy
  • Support Procurement stakeholders by transforming data into meaningful insights and decision-support reporting
  • Design, maintain, and improve reporting frameworks, dashboards, KPIs, and data quality controls to support procurement performance and governance
  • Monitor procurement KPIs and vendor performance metrics, identifying areas for optimization
  • Ensure data quality, integrity, and consistency across multiple enterprise systems (e.g. ERP, procurement tools, vendor management platforms)
  • Support business analysis and data-related initiatives across Procurement, Finance, and IT systems
  • Collaborate closely with Procurement stakeholders and cross-functionally with Finance, Risk, Compliance, IT, and Data teams
  • Contribute to process improvements by leveraging data insights and supporting automation initiatives within Procurement
  • Support audits and reporting needs related to procurement data, ensuring accuracy and traceability

Your Skills, Experience, And Qualifications Required

  • Master’s degree in Economics, Engineering, Data Analytics, Business Analytics, Statistics, or a related field
  • 2-5 years of experience in data analysis, reporting, or business intelligence roles
  • Strong analytical mindset with proven experience in data analysis, KPI monitoring, and reporting
  • Experience working with structured datasets and business systems (e.g. ERP)
  • Advanced Excel skills and strong proficiency in data manipulation and reporting

4409256806,https://it.linkedin.com/jobs/view/junior-data-analyst-stage-at-sdg-group-italy-4409256806?position=41&pageNum=0&refId=fQ3hd0f2xk3SSqpZ69m3LA%3D%3D&trackingId=VimbrYaRiVi8d0RCSy6jPg%3D%3D,Junior Data Analyst - Stage,SDG Group Italy,"Milan, Lombardy, Italy","In SDG hai l’opportunità di diventare un esperto di Big Data & Analytics e di entrare a far parte di una delle società più all’avanguardia d’Europa in questo ambito. Potrai partecipare a diversi progetti nazionali e internazionali lavorando in team giovani e dinamici. Vengono effettuate valutazioni periodiche di performance e acquisizione di skills che ti permetteranno di fare velocemente carriera nella nostra realtà. Avrai inoltre modo di costruire il tuo career path personalizzato scegliendo tra diversi percorsi. Partendo da un livello base, attraverso training, coaching, mentoring, e un approccio never-stop-learning diventerai un esperto nella progettazione e sviluppo di practices con le quali far adottare ai nostri clienti un’ottica data driven.
Your Challenges:
Acquisire una conoscenza dei big data & analytics a 360°: data architecture, data management, data visualization e data analysis
Sviluppare hard skills nell’utilizzo delle tecnologie di business intelligence e soft skills per relazionarsi con il cliente e il proprio team di lavoro
Capacità di muoversi e interagire in un ambiente internazionale, rapido e dinamico assumendosi gradualmente maggiori responsabilità e autonomia nei tasks
Requirements:

Technology attitude: SQL, VBA, R, Python, tecnologie di Business Intelligence, Data manipulation, Data Management sono solo il punto di partenza ma non preoccuparti se la tua conoscenza è a un livello base: abbiamo un Learning Center per renderti velocemente un Data Cruncher.

Team player: un buon giocatore di squadra è una persona altruista, dinamica, entusiasta, resiliente e positiva. Sono elementi alla base dei Valori SDG e lavoriamo per far crescere una cultura dei valori a tutti i livelli.
Capacità di elaborare informazioni aziendali complesse e di presentarle con sensibilità agli stakeholder aziendali.
Conoscenza lingua inglese: B1/B2 (verrà testata in sede di colloquio)
Rock your future with SDG:

Academy interne e centri di eccellenza qualificati con possibilità di ottenere certificazioni per i tools più utilizzati nel campo dei big data & analytics: Qlik, PowerBI, Tableau, Microstrategy, SAP Analytics, AWS Redshift, Oracle DB, SQL Server, Google Bigquery, Snowflake etc.

Never stop learning: formazione continua per tutto l’arco della carriera con 80 ore di training iniziale e successiva attività di coaching e mentoring. Valutazioni semestrali del potenziale e della performance.
Ambiente internazionale e giovane: età media inferiore a 30 anni e possibilità di trasferte all’estero.
Smart & Remote working.
SDG Group:

Lavorare in SDG significa entrare a far parte di una delle società di management consulting in più rapida crescita nell’ambito dei Business Analytics, Corporate performance Management e Advanced Business Solutions. Con più di 2000 professionisti in tutto il mondo è stata riconosciuta da Gartner tra le 37 società più all’avanguardia nel settore dei Data & Analytics, l’unica italiana e seconda in Europa. SDG opera in Italia con 4 uffici (Milano, Firenze, Verona e Roma) e dislocamenti in Spagna, Portogallo, Francia, UK, USA e Middle East. Mettiamo la nostra esperienza nel settore degli Analytics a disposizione delle aziende per potenziare le loro strategie di business, facendole diventare organizzazioni data-driven di successo.

4414678363,https://it.linkedin.com/jobs/view/marketing-data-analyst-at-allianz-italia-4414678363?position=42&pageNum=0&refId=fQ3hd0f2xk3SSqpZ69m3LA%3D%3D&trackingId=qDHtjupzBDi05A2y7q4rSQ%3D%3D,Marketing Data Analyst,Allianz Italia,"Milan, Lombardy, Italy","Job Purpose/Role

Parte del Lead Strategy Team, la posizione garantisce la misurazione e l’ottimizzazione delle performance lungo tutto il lead funnel, supportando strategie di generation e massimizzando i tassi di conversione
Key Responsibilities
Monitorare e analizzare il lead funnel end-to-end in termini di KPIs
Sviluppare modelli di attribuzione di lead per massimizzarne la conversione
Creare dashboard e report di funnel performance per i team di business
Collaborare alle strategie di sviluppo e implementazione del funnel per massimizzare cost per volume, cost per lead, conversion e nuovo business generato
Collaborare con Paid Media e UX Specialist
Key Requirements
5 o più anni di esperienza in marketing e data analytics e performance
Competenze in funnel analysis, attribution modelling e full-funnel reporting
Ottima padronanza di strumenti BI/CRM
Capacità di trasformare dati complessi in strategie di lead optimization
Mentalità analitica e consulenziale, orientata ai risultati di conversion

Il Gruppo Allianz è una delle società assicurative e di asset management che godono di maggior fiducia al mondo. Prendersi cura dei nostri dipendenti, delle loro ambizioni, sogni e sfide è ciò che ci rende un datore di lavoro unico. Insieme possiamo costruire un ambiente in cui ognuno si senta valorizzato e abbia la fiducia necessaria per esplorare, crescere e plasmare un futuro migliore per i nostri clienti e per il mondo che ci circonda.

In Allianz, riteniamo che uniti siamo più forti: crediamo che un mondo unito sia un mondo più prospero e ci impegniamo a difendere costantemente pari opportunità per tutti. E alla base di tutto ciò c’è il nostro ambiente di lavoro inclusivo, dove contano sia le persone che le performance e che promuove una cultura fondata sull’integrità, la correttezza, l’inclusione e la fiducia.

Pertanto accogliamo le candidature indipendentemente da etnia o background culturale, età, genere, nazionalità, religione, classe sociale, disabilità o orientamento sessuale o qualsivoglia altra caratteristica protetta da leggi o regolamentazioni locali.
Join us. Let's care for tomorrow.
Tutte le nostre offerte sono rivolte ad entrambi i sessi ai sensi della L. 9 dicembre 1977, n. 903 (s.m.i).

Are you ready to accelerate your potential and make a real difference within life sciences, diagnostics and biotechnology?
At Beckman Coulter Diagnostics, one of Danaher’s 15+ operating companies, our work saves lives—and we’re all united by a shared commitment to innovate for tangible impact.

You’ll thrive in a culture of belonging where you and your unique viewpoint matter. And by harnessing Danaher’s system of continuous improvement, you help turn ideas into impact – innovating at the speed of life.

As a global leader in clinical diagnostics, Beckman Coulter Diagnostics has challenged convention to elevate the diagnostic laboratory’s role in improving patient health for more than 90 years. Our diagnostic solutions are used in routine and complex clinical testing, and are used in hospitals, reference and research laboratories, and physician offices around the world. Every hour around the world, more than one million tests are run on Beckman Coulter Diagnostics systems, impacting 1.2 billion patients and more than three million clinicians per year. From uncovering the next clinical breakthrough, to rapid and reliable sample analysis, to more rigorous decision making—we are enabling clinicians to deliver the best possible care to their patients with improved efficiency, clinical confidence, adaptive collaboration, and accelerated intelligence.
Learn about the Danaher Business System which makes everything possible.

We are looking for a motivated and analytical intern to support our Service organization through data analysis and reporting activities. The ideal candidate is currently studying Statistics, Mathematics, Data Science, or a related field, and has a strong interest in transforming data into meaningful business insights.
Key Responsibilities
Analyze service-related data and operational KPIs
Support the creation and maintenance of dashboards and reports in Power BI
Monitor service performance metrics and identify trends or anomalies
Assist in data collection, validation, and reporting activities
Prepare periodic presentations and summaries based on data analysis
Requirements
Currently pursuing a degree in Statistics, Mathematics, Data Science, Engineering, or a related analytical field
Good understanding of numerical analysis and data interpretation
Basic to intermediate knowledge of Power BI
Familiarity with Excel and data management tools
Fluent in English
What We Offer
Opportunity to gain hands-on experience in an international service environment
Exposure to operational and business performance analytics
Mentoring and development within a dynamic team
Experience working with real business data and reporting tools such as Power BI

Join our winning team today. Together, we’ll accelerate the real-life impact of tomorrow’s science and technology. We partner with customers across the globe to help them solve their most complex challenges, architecting solutions that bring the power of science to life.
For more information, visit www.danaher.com.

4411177784,https://it.linkedin.com/jobs/view/marketing-data-analyst-at-allianz-italia-4411177784?position=44&pageNum=0&refId=fQ3hd0f2xk3SSqpZ69m3LA%3D%3D&trackingId=Voi%2BBqJa36YK2W276WTPzA%3D%3D,Marketing Data Analyst,Allianz Italia,"Milan, Lombardy, Italy","Job Purpose/Role

Parte del Lead Strategy Team, la posizione garantisce la misurazione e l’ottimizzazione delle performance lungo tutto il lead funnel, supportando strategie di generation e massimizzando i tassi di conversione
Key Responsibilities
Monitorare e analizzare il lead funnel end-to-end in termini di KPIs
Sviluppare modelli di attribuzione di lead per massimizzarne la conversione
Creare dashboard e report di funnel performance per i team di business
Collaborare alle strategie di sviluppo e implementazione del funnel per massimizzare cost per volume, cost per lead, conversion e nuovo business generato
Collaborare con Paid Media e UX Specialist
Key Requirements
5 o più anni di esperienza in marketing e data analytics e performance
Competenze in funnel analysis, attribution modelling e full-funnel reporting
Ottima padronanza di strumenti BI/CRM
Capacità di trasformare dati complessi in strategie di lead optimization
Mentalità analitica e consulenziale, orientata ai risultati di conversion

Il Gruppo Allianz è una delle società assicurative e di asset management che godono di maggior fiducia al mondo. Prendersi cura dei nostri dipendenti, delle loro ambizioni, sogni e sfide è ciò che ci rende un datore di lavoro unico. Insieme possiamo costruire un ambiente in cui ognuno si senta valorizzato e abbia la fiducia necessaria per esplorare, crescere e plasmare un futuro migliore per i nostri clienti e per il mondo che ci circonda.

In Allianz, riteniamo che uniti siamo più forti: crediamo che un mondo unito sia un mondo più prospero e ci impegniamo a difendere costantemente pari opportunità per tutti. E alla base di tutto ciò c’è il nostro ambiente di lavoro inclusivo, dove contano sia le persone che le performance e che promuove una cultura fondata sull’integrità, la correttezza, l’inclusione e la fiducia.

Pertanto accogliamo le candidature indipendentemente da etnia o background culturale, età, genere, nazionalità, religione, classe sociale, disabilità o orientamento sessuale o qualsivoglia altra caratteristica protetta da leggi o regolamentazioni locali.
Join us. Let's care for tomorrow.
Tutte le nostre offerte sono rivolte ad entrambi i sessi ai sensi della L. 9 dicembre 1977, n. 903 (s.m.i).

4369695219,https://it.linkedin.com/jobs/view/digital-analyst-at-miroglio-group-4369695219?position=45&pageNum=0&refId=fQ3hd0f2xk3SSqpZ69m3LA%3D%3D&trackingId=lqxBS%2BSwh6GHjJuJ47eGWA%3D%3D,Digital Analyst,Miroglio Group,"Milan, Lombardy, Italy","Siamo il Gruppo Miroglio, una realtà internazionale fondata ad Alba nel 1947 fatta di persone con un forte spirito imprenditoriale e lo sguardo rivolto al futuro senza dimenticare il passato.

Ogni giorno agiamo con passione e facciamo accadere le cose, esplorando il mondo della moda in tutte le sue forme: dal fashion retail con i nostri 10 brand di abbigliamento (tra cui Trussardi, Elena Mirò, Motivi, Oltre e Fiorella Rubino), alla stampa transfer con Sublitex, fino alla logistica integrata e al supply chain management.
La Tua Opportunità:

In questo ruolo avrai l’obiettivo di analizzare e monitorare i dati comportamentali ed economici relativi agli e-commerce dei brand del gruppo. Aiuterai i brand nella comprensione delle micro e macro-dinamiche del canale e supporterai strategie di business e di ottimizzazione del customer journey.
Il ruolo è a diretto riporto dell’E-commerce & Analytics Manager.
La tua Missione:
Analisi del comportamento degli utenti sulle property online (5 siti E-Commerce del gruppo), attraverso strumenti di Web Analytics, e identificazione di insight.
Verifica della corretta implementazione dei tracciamenti di Web Analytics necessari per la misurazione delle performance del sito.
Analisi dei dati e degli obiettivi raggiunti in ambito e-commerce, Merchandising, Visual Merchandising, Digital Production, Digital Media, Email Marketing e CRM.
Condivisione di raccomandazioni a supporto delle decisioni di business, integrando un punto di vista analitico al contesto di mercato e di brand.
Supporto analitico nella costruzione del budget e-commerce.
Supporto nel set up di analisi e dashboard da parte di stakeholder del team. Digital & Omnichannel: team E-commerce, Merchandising, Digital Media e CRM.
Creazione di modelli di business volti alla comprensione delle performance di canale.
Le tue Skills:
Laurea Magistrale in ambito STEM (Statistica, Ingegneria, Matematica o simili).
2+ anni di esperienza nel ruolo di Analyst nell'area Digital.
Padronanza nell'utilizzo di strumenti di web analytics e data visualization.
Conoscenza e utilizzo della suite Microsoft Office, in particolare Microsoft Excel.
La conoscenza di almeno uno strumento di data science (R, SAS, Stack Amazon o simili) è un plus.
Passione per il mercato Digital, le sue innovazioni e tecnologie in generale.
Forte mindset analitico.
Ottime capacità relazionali e comunicative.
Abilità nel lavorare con team cross-funzionali.
Propensione alla leadership.
Inglese fluente.
Cosa ti offriremo:
Un'azienda giovane e dinamica che crede nel talento e mette le persone al centro
L’opportunità di crescere e avere un reale impatto, in un contesto fortemente meritocratico basato su performance management e obiettivi chiari e definiti
Onboarding specifico per il tuo ruolo, dove verrai formata/o sul nostro business, sui nostri processi e tools
Formazione continua sia in aula che online
Convenzioni aziendali e iniziative di well-being (servizio di supporto psicologico, flessibilità oraria, corsi di yoga e pilates, e molto altro)
Asilo aziendale, con orari e periodi di apertura in linea con quelli aziendali
Sconto almeno del 40% sui capi di tutti i nostri brand
Sede di lavoro: ibrida tra HQ di Alba (CN) e Milano con possibilità di svolgere smart working

Crediamo nel valore delle persone e della diversità in tutte le sue forme. Guardiamo al talento, non alle etichette, e accogliamo con rispetto chiunque voglia mettersi in gioco, garantendo pari opportunità indipendentemente da genere, età, identità o background. Se hai bisogno di supporto durante il processo di selezione, siamo a tua disposizione

4406464646,https://it.linkedin.com/jobs/view/jr-data-strategist-internship-at-cheil-italy-4406464646?position=48&pageNum=0&refId=fQ3hd0f2xk3SSqpZ69m3LA%3D%3D&trackingId=BbROpVE001xD0M5hjt%2F4bA%3D%3D,Jr. Data Strategist - Internship,Cheil Italy,"Milan, Lombardy, Italy","Cheil Italy, the data-driven creativity Agency under the Samsung Group, is looking for a curious, analytical and AI-oriented Data Strategist Intern to join our Performance & Strategy Team.

This internship is designed for students eager to gain hands-on experience in digital performance analysis, data interpretation and strategic planning within a dynamic and data-driven agency environment.
Your Role
You will support the team in the strategy, development and monitoring of performance-driven communication activities for our main clients.
You will contribute to:
• Supporting the execution and monitoring of multi-channel activities, tracking performance against objectives and key metrics.
• Analysing data to extract insights and support strategic recommendations.
• Assisting in the preparation of reports and presentations for internal and external stakeholders.
• Contributing to the creation of dashboards, graphs and data visualizations.
• Supporting the setup and optimization of tracking and reporting processes.
Requirements
• Academic background in Marketing, Economics, Data Science, Statistics, Management Engineering or related fields.

• Strong interest in AI and data innovation: curiosity about AI applications in performance analysis, automation, predictive models or data-driven strategy, with a proactive attitude in exploring AI tools.
• Strong analytical mindset and attention to detail.
• Good knowledge of Excel.
• Familiarity (academic or personal) with Data Visualization tools such as Power BI, Tableau or similar.
• Basic understanding of digital performance metrics and KPIs.
• Good level of English.
• Team player mindset, curiosity and willingness to learn in a fast-paced environment.
Place of work: Milan
About Cheil
Cheil Italia Srl is a subsidiary of Cheil Worldwide Inc.
We redefine the way brands connect and engage with consumers.

Data is our foundation, technology is our building block. We drive our clients to address change creating 360° communication projects mixing advertising, digital marketing, retail and experiential marketing.
Our ethical approach
We are a certified Agency with the following certifications:
• Certified Quality System – ISO9001
• Certified Anti-Bribery – ISO37001
• Certified Carbon Footprint - ISO14064
• Certified Gender-Equality – UNI 125:2022
• Occupational Health & Safety – ISO45001
We are an equal opportunity employer

All aspects of employment including the decision to hire, promote, discipline, or discharge, will be based on merit, competence, performance, and business needs. We do not discriminate based on race, color, religion, age, physical or mental disability, medical condition, pregnancy, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression.

4416398113,https://it.linkedin.com/jobs/view/senior-data-analyst-at-jobgether-4416398113?position=49&pageNum=0&refId=fQ3hd0f2xk3SSqpZ69m3LA%3D%3D&trackingId=NTMqvGgnedV8DZDpzp%2BW0w%3D%3D,Senior Data Analyst,Jobgether,Greater Milan Metropolitan Area,"This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Senior Data Analyst in Italy.

This is a high-impact analytics role at the core of a fast-growing, performance-driven digital organization. You will transform complex marketing, financial, and operational data into clear insights that directly shape business strategy and decision-making. Acting as a key partner to leadership, finance, and operations teams, you will build forecasting models, reporting systems, and automated data workflows that improve visibility and drive performance. The role combines technical depth with business acumen, requiring someone who can move seamlessly between data infrastructure, analysis, and strategic storytelling. You will operate in a fast-paced, fully remote environment where ownership, precision, and scalability are essential. This position is ideal for a data professional who enjoys building systems that power real-time, high-stakes business decisions.
Accountabilities
Develop and maintain forecasting models for revenue, headcount, and business performance to support strategic planning and decision-making.
Translate historical and operational data into forward-looking insights, identifying risks, trends, and growth opportunities.
Build, maintain, and optimize dashboards using BI tools such as Power BI, Looker, Tableau, or similar platforms.
Design standardized reporting frameworks for marketing, client performance, media spend, and core business KPIs.
Automate manual reporting processes by building scalable data pipelines and integrating multiple data sources.
Manage and enhance data workflows using tools such as Supermetrics, Google Sheets, and Apps Script for seamless reporting automation.
Ensure data integrity, consistency, and quality across all reporting systems and databases.
Design and maintain structured databases to support operations, finance, and performance reporting needs.
Requirements
3-6 years of experience in data analytics, business intelligence, or similar roles, preferably in fast-paced digital, agency, or DTC environments.
Strong proficiency in SQL, Python, or equivalent tools for data analysis, querying, and pipeline development.
Advanced expertise in Google Sheets and Excel, including complex formulas, automation, and scripting (Apps Script preferred).
Hands-on experience with BI tools such as Power BI, Looker, Tableau, or comparable platforms.
Strong understanding of marketing and performance data, including familiarity with paid media platforms like Meta, Google, and TikTok.
Experience building dashboards, reporting systems, and automated data workflows from multiple data sources.
Strong systems thinking with the ability to design scalable, reliable data infrastructure rather than one-off reports.
High attention to detail with strong problem-solving skills and data accuracy mindset.
Ability to work independently in a remote, fast-paced environment with strong ownership and accountability.
Excellent communication skills to translate data insights into clear business recommendations.
Benefits
Competitive monthly compensation in the range of $2,000-$4,000 USD.
Fully remote work setup with global team collaboration.
Opportunity to work on high-impact marketing and business intelligence systems.
Exposure to large-scale performance marketing operations and datasets.
High autonomy and ownership over analytics infrastructure and reporting systems.

4417475873,https://it.linkedin.com/jobs/view/junior-data-scientist-at-deloitte-4417475873?position=50&pageNum=0&refId=fQ3hd0f2xk3SSqpZ69m3LA%3D%3D&trackingId=%2FAbhfo2rzYBZAUfw9yREZg%3D%3D,Junior - Data Scientist,Deloitte,"Milan, Lombardy, Italy","Stiamo cercando una figura junior da inserire nel team Smart Solutions Lab di Deloitte Business Solution nella sede di Milano, che lavorerà in modalità Hybrid.

Lo Smart Solutions Lab sviluppa piattaforme e soluzioni data-driven altamente personalizzate per i clienti, integrando tecnologie avanzate, automazione e analisi dei dati. La nuova risorsa lavorerà all’interno di un team multidisciplinare e contribuirà allo sviluppo e alla gestione di sistemi basati su dati complessi e processi automatizzati.
Your Role
La risorsa Junior verrà affiancata da profili più senior e, nel tempo, si occuperà di:
Supportare attività di data preparation, trasformazione e integrazione dati.
Sviluppare dashboards per analisi statistiche sui clienti.
Scrivere ed eseguire query SQL per estrarre, unire e analizzare dati da database relazionali.
Documentare procedure, dataset e funzionalità sviluppate.
Lavorare in team con data scientist, data engineer, sviluppatori e consulenti con background diversi.
Winning Requirements
Laurea triennale o magistrale in discipline STEM, economiche, statistiche o affini.
Esperienza lavorativa complessiva < 1 anno, compresi stage/tirocini.
Esperienza con strumenti di Data Visualization (Power BI, Tableau, Qlik).
Conoscenza delle basi di SQL: join, filtri, aggregazioni, query su database relazionali.
Familiarità con strumenti di analisi e gestione dati.
Capacità di lavorare in team, buona comunicazione e predisposizione al problem solving.
Buona conoscenza della lingua inglese.
Nice to have
Esperienza con servizi cloud (Azure, AWS, Databricks, ecc.)
Conoscenza base di Python: strutture dati, notebook, manipolazione dati (preferibilmente con librerie come pandas).
Conoscenza base di concetti di automazione, AI/ML o di strumenti cloud.
Conoscenza, anche introduttiva, di C# o del framework .NET.
Esperienza con sistemi di versionamento del codice (Git) e ambienti di sviluppo come VS Code.
To Make An Impact That Matters
Il network Deloitte, leader nei servizi professionali alle imprese, opera a livello globale in più di 150 Paesi con oltre 460 mila persone.

In Italia, Deloitte è presente in 24 città con circa 13.400 persone che assistono i clienti offrendo servizi di Audit & Assurance, Technology & Transformantion, Strategy, Risk & Transactions Advisory e Tax & Legal.

In qualità di network globale ci impegniamo per affrontare le principali sfide sociali, economiche e ambientali della società di oggi. WorldImpact è il nostro programma globale che riunisce tutte le iniziative attraverso cui vogliamo avere un impatto positivo sulle persone, i clienti, l’ambiente e le comunità in cui operiamo.

Con Impact for Italy, la declinazione italiana di WorldImpact, Deloitte ha realizzato progetti che - in collaborazione con istituzioni, realtà del terzo settore, università e altri soggetti - hanno lasciato un impatto concreto e una legacy per il futuro su tutto il territorio nazionale.

La ricerca rispetta il d.lgs. 198/2006, il D.lgs. 215/03 e il D.lgs. 216/03 ed è aperta a candidat* di qualsiasi orientamento o espressione di genere, orientamento sessuale, età, etnia e credo religioso. Il presente annuncio è stato ideato nel rispetto della diversity e dell’inclusività.

4416180743,https://it.linkedin.com/jobs/view/data-analyst-analytics-engineering-at-satispay-4416180743?position=51&pageNum=0&refId=fQ3hd0f2xk3SSqpZ69m3LA%3D%3D&trackingId=dIloeb73iv4cFZyhHN4m4A%3D%3D,Data Analyst - Analytics Engineering,Satispay,"Milan, Lombardy, Italy","About Us

Satispay began by rethinking the simple act of a payment to remove the friction from our daily routines. But we didn’t stop there. Today, we are building a complete financial platform designed to empower people and concretely improve their lives. By giving our 6 million users a clear, open path to pay, save, and invest, we are evolving into the definitive destination for every financial need.
What You'll Be Doing

As our Data Analyst - Analytics Engineering, you’ll be the person who drives our data strategy and enhances decision-making by developing scalable data assets and AI-powered workflows. You will join the Growth & Marketing (G&M) B2C Analytics team, which sits at the heart of our department with the mission to put intelligence first in every decision. Here's what your day-to-day will look like:

Lead Design Data Architecture – Drive the development of the Data Mesh layer by designing robust data models and building pipelines that integrate into the company's federated data strategy, ensuring scalable and governed data ownership.

Define AI Agentic Workflows – Design and implement AI-powered agentic workflows for data transformation and exploration, accelerating analytical capabilities and enabling self-service for key stakeholders.
Build High-Impact Visualisation Tools – Define key metrics and develop dashboards and reports (using tools like Hex or Looker) that communicate analytical insights effectively.

Drive Decision-Making Through Data – Analyse complex datasets to identify patterns impacting the consumer funnel (Acquisition, Engagement, Retention, Monetisation) and partner with Marketing Managers to maximise ROI.
Partner with Key Stakeholders – Act as a strategic partner for Marketing, Finance, Operations, and Product, bridging the gap between technical data and business goals.
Drive Testing Initiatives – Own the end-to-end testing pipeline, from opportunity identification to experiment design and recommendation delivery.
Who We're Looking For
We need a problem-solver who loves teamwork and gets things done. If you're curious and ready for real ownership, you'll fit in! Does this sound like you?
Relevant Experience – 5+ years in data-related roles (Data Engineering, Analytics, BI) with at least 3 years of hands-on experience in high-volume or big data environments.
Technical Proficiency – Strong command of SQL, dbt, and Python. Experience with Git and notebook-based analytics (e.g., Jupyter) is a plus.
Data Modelling & Mesh Expertise – Hands-on experience in data modelling, ETL, data governance, and Data Mesh implementation at scale.
AI Fluency – Proven ability to work with AI tools, including prompting and context management, or interacting with agents programmatically via APIs.
Analytical & Problem-Solving Skills – Comfortable with ambiguity, able to break down complex problems into focused workstreams and deliver evidence-based answers.
Stakeholder Management & Communication – Able to independently lead initiatives across diverse business domains and translate technical findings into clear, actionable recommendations.
Digital Consumer Lifecycle Knowledge – Solid understanding of consumer lifecycle (Acquisition, Activation, Retention, Churn) and user economics (ARPU, CAC, LTV).
CareAbout: how we support your impact
About

We move fast, and evolution never stops. It’s a fun ride, but it can be challenging. To make sure our people truly thrive, we’re committed to making their lives easier, both in the office and out in the world. That’s why we created CareAbout:
❤️ Health (Private insurance for you and your family, psychological support with Serenis, mental health workshops)
💰 Financial resources (Stock Option Plan, Meal vouchers, Relocation support if you’re moving countries)
⚙️ Growth and development (Professional development programs, Internal mobility, Language courses with Preply)
🌱 Flexibility (Unlimited PTO, Hybrid working policy*, Flexible working hours)
👨‍👩‍👧 Family (Enhanced parental leave, Additional leave for child sickness)
We embrace three days per week in-office (Tuesday and Thursday + 1 of your choice), with the option to request extra remote time.
Equal opportunity employer

At Satispay, we're proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and inclusion, welcoming individuals of all backgrounds. This opportunity is open to everyone, regardless - for instance - of race, colour, religion, sex, gender identity, sexual orientation, and national origin. Join us in a workplace where everyone belongs!
Learn More About Us
Our values and pillars aren’t just fancy words on a page - they really shape everything we do. Explore them here.
By submitting this application, I acknowledge that I have read and understood the content of the Privacy Policy

4415798939,https://it.linkedin.com/jobs/view/data-science-specialist-at-prada-group-4415798939?position=52&pageNum=0&refId=fQ3hd0f2xk3SSqpZ69m3LA%3D%3D&trackingId=FJcxIwzq0%2FF87iaK%2Ffa0og%3D%3D,Data Science Specialist,Prada Group,"Milan, Lombardy, Italy","Job description:

Founded in 1913 in Italy, the Prada Group was built on a tradition of excellence and with a vision of innovation. The Group, a world leader in the luxury sector, operates in more than 45 countries with the PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church’s, Car Shoe and Luna Rossa brands, and has employees of over 100 nationalities.
JOB PURPOSE

We are seeking a Data Science Specialist to join the Data & Analytics Team within IT. Based in our Milan HQ, the role focuses on designing and industrializing AI solutions for customer personalization and recommendation systems. The ideal candidate combines strong technical skills with the ability to coordinate small external development teams and work across multiple IT and business functions on complex enterprise programs.
RESPONSIBILITIES
Design and deploy personalization models and recommendation engines, translating business requirements into scalable, data-driven solutions.
Lead the full lifecycle of data science projects — from prototyping to production — ensuring alignment with enterprise platform standards.
Coordinate small teams of external developers, overseeing code quality, timelines, and deliverables.
Collaborate on cross-IT programs, managing dependencies with other teams (Data Platform, Integration, Digital, CRM) and business stakeholders.
Build and maintain scalable data pipelines on Databricks and Azure to support model training, serving, and continuous improvement.
Monitor model performance and proactively identify opportunities to enhance accuracy and business impact.
Contribute to ML Ops best practices and reusable frameworks within the Data Science area.
KNOWLEDGE AND SKILLS
Master’s degree in a quantitative field (Statistics, Computer Science, Machine Learning, Data Science, Mathematics, Engineering) or equivalent experience.
4+ years of industry experience in data science, with a strong focus on personalization and recommendation systems.
Advanced proficiency in Python and PySpark

Founded in 1913 in Italy, the Prada Group was built on a tradition of excellence and with a vision of innovation. Hai passione per l'Innovazione Digitale e vuoi metterti in gioco in un contesto di ricerca dinamico e all’avanguardia? Gli Osservatori Digital Innovation della School of Management del Politecnico di Milano ti offrono un’opportunità unica di crescita professionale in un ambiente stimolante e altamente qualificato!

Dal 1999, siamo un punto di riferimento per l'Innovazione Digitale in Italia, integrando ricerca applicata, comunicazione, aggiornamento continuo e networking. Oggi, siamo alla ricerca di un/una Junior Research Analyst per supportare le nostre attività di ricerca nei seguenti ambiti:
Arte&Cultura/Turismo
AI
AgriFood
Logistica
Advanced Connectivity
In qualità di Junior Research Analyst, avrai l'opportunità di:
🔍 Analizzare la letteratura nazionale e internazionale su temi di innovazione digitale
🎤 Partecipare a interviste con il top management di aziende, sintetizzando i contenuti emersi
📊 Realizzare studi di caso sulle principali iniziative nel settore
📝 Supportare la stesura di survey e l'elaborazione dei risultati
📅 Contribuire all’organizzazione di eventi e workshop tematici
📣 Gestire attività di comunicazione, inclusi social media e newsletter
🤝 Mantenere relazioni con la nostra community di esperti, aziende e istituzioni
Cerchiamo una persona curiosa, smart e intraprendente che possieda:
- Laurea Magistrale in Ingegneria Gestionale, Economia, Management o ambiti affini ai temi di ricerca
- Conoscenza madrelingua della lingua italiana e ottima conoscenza della lingua inglese (sia scritta che parlata)
- Competenze avanzate in Office (Excel, PowerPoint)
- Passione per l'innovazione digitale e la ricerca applicata
- Capacità analitiche e di sintesi dei dati, con spirito critico e attenzione ai dettagli
- Proattività e spirito di iniziativa
- Capacità di lavorare in team e di gestire le relazioni interpersonali
Entrando nel nostro team, potrai godere di una stage retribuito con l'opportunità di lavorare in un ambiente giovane, stimolante e altamente innovativo, con accesso a:
🌟 Esperienza su temi di innovazione digitale di eccellenza
🌟 Formazione continua e personalizzata
🌟 Networking professionale con colleghi, aziende e istituzioni di alto livello
🌟 Un ambiente di lavoro dinamico e orientato alla crescita
Non perdere questa occasione, candidati ora e inizia il tuo percorso con noi! 🚀

4397276921,https://it.linkedin.com/jobs/view/data-analysis-insights-project-intern-tiktok-shop-2026-start-bs-ms%EF%BC%89-at-tiktok-4397276921?position=56&pageNum=0&refId=fQ3hd0f2xk3SSqpZ69m3LA%3D%3D&trackingId=kwM%2Bqv2LpMnFuaE0OxyTYw%3D%3D,Data Analysis & Insights Project Intern (TikTok Shop) - 2026 Start (BS/MS）,TikTok,"Milan, Lombardy, Italy","Responsibilities
About the team

the e-commerce industry has seen tremendous growth in recent years and has become a hotly contested space amongst leading Internet companies, and its future growth cannot be underestimated. With millions of loyal users globally, we believe TikTok is an ideal platform to deliver a brand new and better e-commerce experience to our users.

As a project intern, you will have the opportunity to engage in impactful short-term projects that provide you with a glimpse of professional real-world experience. You will gain practical skills through on-the-job learning in a fast-paced work environment and develop a deeper understanding of your career interests.
Applications will be reviewed on a rolling basis - we encourage you to apply early.
Responsibilities
Support project-based goal tracking by monitoring key metrics across merchant and product performance, including sample supply, content output, and sales contribution.
Analyze data to identify high-potential merchants and products, helping define the incubation profile and pathway for affiliate-focused sellers.
Track and report on sample supply and content creation trends, identifying gaps and opportunities to optimize resource allocation.
Assist in preparing weekly reports and analytical materials to summarize business performance and highlight key trends.
Contribute to case study development by analyzing merchant and product performance, providing data-backed insights to support Account Managers in merchant outreach and pitch preparation.
Help synthesize best practices and develop actionable pathways for merchants to optimize their affiliate investments.
Support the consolidation of hit product cases by gathering data and insights from cross-functional teams, including policy resources, merchant BD inputs, and match-making incubation cases.
Assist in quantifying the value of hit products by analyzing metrics such as sustained GMV growth contribution, merchant tier upgrades, and overall store GMV impact.

Help document and communicate the methodology behind hit product incubation—for example, the correlation between sample investments, content volume, creator partnerships, and product success—to educate merchants and Account Managers on best practices.
Qualifications
Minimum Qualifications
Currently pursuing a Bachelor's degree or above.
Available to start immediately till the end of the year
Highly interested in the e-commerce industry, with strong curiosity and the ability to learn quickly. And understand the short video/content and live broadcast ecosystems of TikTok.
Proficient in Excel/Google/Lark Sheets, with basic data analysis skills
Preferred Qualifications
Be sensitive to data and be able to proficiently use at least one data visualization analysis tool.
Previous experience in influencer affiliate , content strategy, or e-commerce operations will be highly valued.
Programming or coding skills are a plus
column2: interest in leveraging internal and external tools and models to explore AI-powered solutions for operational work is highly preferred.

column1: Job Information
About TikTok

TikTok is the leading destination for short-form mobile video. At TikTok, our mission is to inspire creativity and bring joy. TikTok's global headquarters are in Los Angeles and Singapore, and we also have offices in New York City, London, Dublin, Paris, Berlin, Dubai, Jakarta, Seoul, and Tokyo.
Why Join Us

Inspiring creativity is at the core of TikTok's mission. Our innovative product is built to help people authentically express themselves, discover and connect – and our global, diverse teams make that possible. Together, we create value for our communities, inspire creativity and bring joy - a mission we work towards every day.

We strive to do great things with great people. We lead with curiosity, humility, and a desire to make impact in a rapidly growing tech company. Every challenge is an opportunity to learn and innovate as one team. We're resilient and embrace challenges as they come. By constantly iterating and fostering an ""Always Day 1"" mindset, we achieve meaningful breakthroughs for ourselves, our company, and our users. When we create and grow together, the possibilities are limitless. Join us.
Diversity & Inclusion

TikTok is committed to creating an inclusive space where employees are valued for their skills, experiences, and unique perspectives. Our platform connects people from across the globe and so does our workplace. At TikTok, our mission is to inspire creativity and bring joy. To achieve that goal, we are committed to celebrating our diverse voices and to creating an environment that reflects the many communities we reach. We are passionate about this and hope you are too.

the e-commerce industry has seen tremendous growth in recent years and has become a hotly contested space amongst leading Internet companies, and its future growth cannot be underestimated. As a project intern, you will have the opportunity to engage in impactful short-term projects that provide you with a glimpse of professional real-world experience. Applications will be reviewed on a rolling basis - we encourage you to apply early.

  • Analyze data to identify high-potential merchants and products, helping define the incubation profile and pathway for affiliate-focused sellers.

Qualifications

  • Currently pursuing a Bachelor's degree or above.

  • Highly interested in the e-commerce industry, with strong curiosity and the ability to learn quickly. And understand the short video/content and live broadcast ecosystems of TikTok.

4412891858,https://it.linkedin.com/jobs/view/business-intelligence-specialist-at-stroili-4412891858?position=57&pageNum=0&refId=fQ3hd0f2xk3SSqpZ69m3LA%3D%3D&trackingId=d7JIDyYwICYSaf5iAZ1lNA%3D%3D,Business Intelligence Specialist,Stroili,"Rozzano, Lombardy, Italy","Chi siamo:

In Stroili abbiamo reso accessibili i nostri gioielli a un pubblico trasversale, mantenendo le caratteristiche di eleganza, bellezza e preziosità del prodotto. Con oltre 400 negozi in Italia e un canale E-Commerce siamo leader in Italia nel nostro settore e parte del Gruppo Thom, primo player a livello Europa nella gioielleria accessibile.
Entra a far parte del Team Stroili!
Chi cerchiamo:

Per il potenziamento della funzione Business Intelligence, siamo alla ricerca di un/una BI Specialist che supporterà il team nello sviluppo, nel monitoraggio e nell’ottimizzazione dei processi di reporting e analisi dei dati, collaborando attivamente con i principali dipartimenti aziendali. In particolare, si occuperà delle seguenti attività:
Gestione del reporting aziendale: dalla raccolta delle informazioni e delle richieste al follow-up, collaborando con i principali dipartimenti e responsabili di funzione.

Creazione e ottimizzazione di report: impostare nuovi report e dashboard, identificando opportunità di miglioramento e garantendo accuratezza, tempestività ed efficacia nel monitoraggio dei KPI aziendali.
Analisi dei dati: interpretare i risultati e tradurli in insight utili per il business, supportando i processi decisionali.
Supporto ai team interni: facilitare la comprensione delle analisi e promuovere l’utilizzo degli strumenti di Business Intelligence.
Data quality & governance: contribuire al mantenimento della qualità dei dati e alla definizione di standard e best practice.
Innovazione: proporre soluzioni e strumenti analitici che migliorino l’efficienza e la capacità di previsione dell’azienda.
Il/la candidat* ideale è in possesso di:
Laurea in Informatica, Ingegneria Informatica, Ingegneria Gestionale, Statistica, Matematica, Economia aziendale o cultura equivalente
Esperienza di almeno 5 anni in ruoli analoghi (BI/Data Analyst)
Ottima padronanza di Excel (funzioni avanzate, pivot, formule complesse)
Conoscenza del linguaggio SQL per query e gestione database
Esperienza pregressa con strumenti di BI (preferibile Qlik Sense oppure Power BI o equivalenti)
Ottima conoscenza della lingua inglese scritta e parlata
Ottime capacità analitiche e problem solving
Attitudine al lavoro in team e ottime doti comunicative
Orientamento al dettaglio e alla precisione.
La conoscenza del tool Snowflake e delle Data Platform saranno considerare un plus.
Cosa offriamo:
Contratto a tempo indeterminato, smart working 2 gg a settimana e buoni pasto.
Sede di lavoro:
Comprensorio Milano Fiori, Strada 8, Palazzo N, Rozzano (MI).
I nostri valori:
• Esigenza: cerchiamo sempre di migliorare anche i più piccoli dettagli
• Spirito di Squadra: lavoriamo insieme per incrementare i nostri successi
• Semplicità: promuoviamo una comunicazione e un'organizzazione semplice e diretta
• Impegno: siamo coinvolti e ci assumiamo la responsabilità di realizzare le nostre ambizioni
• Audacia: incoraggiamo l'iniziativa per rimanere innovativi e di successo.
L'annuncio è rivolto ad entrambi i sessi.

  • Creazione e ottimizzazione di report: impostare nuovi report e dashboard, identificando opportunità di miglioramento e garantendo accuratezza, tempestività ed efficacia nel monitoraggio dei KPI aziendali.
  • Analisi dei dati: interpretare i risultati e tradurli in insight utili per il business, supportando i processi decisionali.
  • Supporto ai team interni: facilitare la comprensione delle analisi e promuovere l’utilizzo degli strumenti di Business Intelligence.
  • Data quality &
column2:
governance: contribuire al mantenimento della qualità dei dati e alla definizione di standard e best practice.
  • Innovazione: proporre soluzioni e strumenti analitici che migliorino l’efficienza e la capacità di previsione dell’azienda.


    • Il/la candidat* ideale è in possesso di:

    • Laurea in Informatica, Ingegneria Informatica, Ingegneria Gestionale, Statistica, Matematica, Economia aziendale o cultura equivalente
column3: • Esperienza di almeno 5 anni in ruoli analoghi (BI/Data Analyst)
column4: • Ottima padronanza di Excel (funzioni avanzate, pivot, formule complesse)
column5: • Conoscenza del linguaggio SQL per query e gestione database
column6: • Esperienza pregressa con strumenti di BI (preferibile Qlik Sense oppure Power BI o equivalenti)
column7: • Ottima conoscenza della lingua inglese scritta e parlata
column8: • Ottime capacità analitiche e problem solving
column9: • Attitudine al lavoro in team e ottime doti comunicative
column10:
• Orientamento al dettaglio e alla precisione.

    • La conoscenza del tool Snowflake e delle Data Platform saranno considerare un plus.


    Cosa offriamo:

    Contratto a tempo indeterminato, smart working 2 gg a settimana e buoni pasto.


    Sede di lavoro:

    Comprensorio Milano Fiori, Strada 8, Palazzo N, Rozzano (MI).


    I nostri valori:

    • Esigenza: cerchiamo sempre di migliorare anche i più piccoli dettagli
column11: • Spirito di Squadra: lavoriamo insieme per incrementare i nostri successi
column12: • Semplicità: promuoviamo una comunicazione e un'organizzazione semplice e diretta
column13: • Impegno: siamo coinvolti e ci assumiamo la responsabilità di realizzare le nostre ambizioni
column14:
• Audacia: incoraggiamo l'iniziativa per rimanere innovativi e di successo.


L'annuncio è rivolto ad entrambi i sessi.

4414100226,https://it.linkedin.com/jobs/view/reporting-data-automation-specialist-at-met-group-4414100226?position=59&pageNum=0&refId=fQ3hd0f2xk3SSqpZ69m3LA%3D%3D&trackingId=gNB060hk0hhX%2B32jiA4ZmA%3D%3D,Reporting & Data Automation Specialist,MET Group,"Milan, Lombardy, Italy","MET Group is an integrated European energy company, headquartered in Switzerland, with activities in natural gas and power, focused on multi-commodity wholesale, trading and sales, as well as energy infrastructure and industrial assets.
MET Group is present in 30 national gas markets and 39 international trading hubs. The Group has a significant end-consumer presence in Croatia, Italy, Hungary, Romania, Slovakia, and Spain.
MET Group has 1000+ permanent staff. The company is owned 90% by MET employees and 10% by Keppel Infrastructure, a wholly owned subsidiary of Keppel Corporation*.

MET Energia Italia is the Italian subsidiary or MET Group, with activities in natural gas, power and renewables, focused on multi-commodity trading and sales, as well as renewables and Energy Efficiency Solutions. After its start up in 2017, MET Energia Italia has now reached a position among the top 20 energy players in the country.

MET Energia Italia’s mission is to become a leading market player by implementing innovation in the Italian energy market. We are a boutique of energy professionals who, thanks to our expertise and hard work, have been able to establish a competitive and highly optimized business in a few years. We are determined to take our success story even further, so we strive to attract highly talented people that are ready to give their best every day and that are eager to continuously develop their skills by taking on big challenges.
Job Description

As we continue to evolve our client portfolio and expand, MET Energia Italia is now looking for a talented Reporting & Data Automation Specialist, who will be contributing to the growth of the company in the Italian market. In this role, you will be responsible for the evolution of the company’s reporting systems, with the goal of increasing their quality, reliability, and level of automation, while reducing manual activities and improving the integration of data coming from multiple sources. You will combine strong Excel skills, IT capabilities, and process vision, acting as a bridge between Finance, Controlling, Credit Management, and technical/IT infrastructures.
Step by step you will take on several activities bringing your invaluable contribution to our daily operations:
Automate data collection and consolidation processes (e.g., from ERP, management systems, external sources)

Design, develop, and maintain structured and automated reporting systems based on databases and integrated data flows (data extraction, normalization, aggregation), transforming manual reports into advanced, dynamic, scalable models for: economic–financial analyses, performance KPIs, margin analysis and cost controlling
Improve data quality (accuracy, consistency, traceability, reconciliations)
Develop dashboards and periodic reports for Management and for the operational functions of the AFC and Credit Management areas
Support internal and external audits
Collaborate with IT and external providers to integrate systems and optimize data sources, while maintaining finance ownership of the figures
Supporting the launch of new ideas and projects to grow the business
Be active and ready to take on new challenges in other areas of MET should this become your desire
Qualifications
BSc or MSc in Statistics or Economics, with a strong academic track record
5 years of relevant experience in similar roles
Familiarity with financial reporting and management control (budgeting, forecasting, and variance analysis)
Ability to read and interpret the Income Statement and Balance Sheet
Data integration from ERP systems (e.g., Microsoft Navision, Business Central) and management systems
Hands-on experience with BI tools (e.g., Power BI) and CRM/Salesforce platforms, will be considered a plus
Sharp analytical and data‑driven mindset with a strong financial and business partnering acumen
Strong attention to accuracy, combined with autonomy, reliability, and a high sense of confidentiality
Proven capacity to work effectively under recurring deadlines in a fast‑paced environment
Fluent in Italian with a strong command of English
Proficient in MS Office, with advanced Excel skills for analysis and reporting
Additional Information

In this role, you will have the opportunity to make a big impact to the overall results of the company. You will be part of a dynamic, innovative growth company which embraces new ideas and encourages everyone to contribute to our strategy.
We have an open, informal culture and we trust our people to get the job done - so we will also give you plenty of autonomy.
You will be working in an international environment which creates opportunities to share knowledge and work together with colleagues from other MET subsidiaries, mainly from the Swiss office.

At Mantu, sustainability is part of everything we do. You’ll have the opportunity to turn your ideas into action and make a tangible impact. Amaris Consulting is proud to be an equal-opportunity workplace. We are committed to promoting diversity within the workforce and creating an inclusive working environment.     • At Mantu, sustainability is part of everything we do. You’ll have the opportunity to turn your ideas into action and make a tangible impact. Every day, our teams bring our ESG commitments to life, from reducing our footprint to driving positive change within our communities. Through our WeCare Together program, you’ll be empowered to design and lead projects that create real social or environmental impact, with the company’s full support.

    Amaris Consulting is proud to be an equal-opportunity workplace. We are committed to promoting diversity within the workforce and creating an inclusive working environment. For this purpose, we welcome applications from all qualified candidates regardless of gender, sexual orientation, race, ethnicity, beliefs, age, marital status, disability, or other characteristics.

4406464646,https://it.linkedin.com/jobs/view/jr-data-strategist-internship-at-cheil-italy-4406464646?position=3&pageNum=2&refId=cZ4HiDp5kOojW4s7nq3Psg%3D%3D&trackingId=5SRWmn0nSKjV%2Fs%2BEPniwHQ%3D%3D,Jr. Data Strategist - Internship,Cheil Italy,"Milan, Lombardy, Italy","Cheil Italy, the data-driven creativity Agency under the Samsung Group, is looking for a curious, analytical and AI-oriented Data Strategist Intern to join our Performance & Strategy Team.

This internship is designed for students eager to gain hands-on experience in digital performance analysis, data interpretation and strategic planning within a dynamic and data-driven agency environment.
Your Role
You will support the team in the strategy, development and monitoring of performance-driven communication activities for our main clients.
You will contribute to:
• Supporting the execution and monitoring of multi-channel activities, tracking performance against objectives and key metrics.
• Analysing data to extract insights and support strategic recommendations.
• Assisting in the preparation of reports and presentations for internal and external stakeholders.
• Contributing to the creation of dashboards, graphs and data visualizations.
• Supporting the setup and optimization of tracking and reporting processes.
Requirements
• Academic background in Marketing, Economics, Data Science, Statistics, Management Engineering or related fields.

• Strong interest in AI and data innovation: curiosity about AI applications in performance analysis, automation, predictive models or data-driven strategy, with a proactive attitude in exploring AI tools.
• Strong analytical mindset and attention to detail.
• Good knowledge of Excel.
• Familiarity (academic or personal) with Data Visualization tools such as Power BI, Tableau or similar.
• Basic understanding of digital performance metrics and KPIs.
• Good level of English.
• Team player mindset, curiosity and willingness to learn in a fast-paced environment.
Place of work: Milan
About Cheil
Cheil Italia Srl is a subsidiary of Cheil Worldwide Inc.
We redefine the way brands connect and engage with consumers.

Data is our foundation, technology is our building block. We drive our clients to address change creating 360° communication projects mixing advertising, digital marketing, retail and experiential marketing.
Our ethical approach
We are a certified Agency with the following certifications:
• Certified Quality System – ISO9001
• Certified Anti-Bribery – ISO37001
• Certified Carbon Footprint - ISO14064
• Certified Gender-Equality – UNI 125:2022
• Occupational Health & Safety – ISO45001
We are an equal opportunity employer

All aspects of employment including the decision to hire, promote, discipline, or discharge, will be based on merit, competence, performance, and business needs. We do not discriminate based on race, color, religion, age, physical or mental disability, medical condition, pregnancy, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression.

4398165641,https://it.linkedin.com/jobs/view/data-analytics-reporting-at-banca-mediolanum-4398165641?position=4&pageNum=2&refId=cZ4HiDp5kOojW4s7nq3Psg%3D%3D&trackingId=xg8eTfbMqWIiT3EkDD%2FD2g%3D%3D,Data Analytics & Reporting,Banca Mediolanum,"Basiglio, Lombardy, Italy","Società
Banca Mediolanum
Posizione
Data Analytics & Reporting
Responsabilità primarie

Banca Mediolanum è un'organizzazione che ridefinisce il panorama finanziario con oltre tre decenni di innovazione. Attraverso le società che ne fanno parte, si dedica a fornire servizi finanziari, bancari e assicurativi su misura che rispondano alle esigenze uniche di ogni cliente. La Banca si impegna a costruire relazioni durature basate sulla fiducia, trasparenza e sull'attenzione ai dettagli. La nostra è una realtà dinamica, fondata su relazioni, responsabilità e libertà. La nostra cultura promuove la positività, la responsabilità e l'innovazione sostenibile. Siamo convinti che il successo di un'azienda sia il risultato del successo individuale dei suoi membri. Nel Gruppo Mediolanum ti offriamo più di un lavoro: l'opportunità di contribuire a un cambiamento positivo e di crescere insieme a noi.
Data Analytics & Reporting

Stiamo cercando una risorsa da inserire all’interno del CdG, in vista del completamento delle attività progettuali legate alla data platform e al nuovo tool per la gestione integrata dei processi core di Pianificazione Operativa e Controllo di Gestione.
Le Attività Che La Risorsa Prenderà In Carico Riguarderanno
Analisi dei dati: analisi di grandi quantità di dati provenienti da varie fonti al fine di monitorare e comprendere i fenomeni di business.

Creazione di report e presentazioni: realizzazione di report dettagliati e dashboard per la visualizzazione dei dati a supporto del Management, fornendo insights strategici per il controllo del business e alimentando la nostra cultura data-driven.
Sviluppo di modelli predittivi: utilizzo di tecniche di analisi per creare modelli in grado di prevedere l’andamento del business.
Gestione delle richieste dati provenienti dalle Autorità di Vigilanza.
Profilo competenze
Requisiti:
Laurea in discipline appartenenti all’area economica (Economia, Statistica) o all’area scientifica (Matematica, Ingegneria, Informatica … ).
Inoltre, il candidato ideale ha già maturato esperienze professionali significative di 3-5 anni, sviluppando le seguenti caratteristiche:

conoscenza approfondita del linguaggio di programmazione SQL (preferibilmente su ambiente Oracle SQL Developer e Databricks), con capacità di gestione di database relazionali e generazione in autonomia di codice per recuperare informazioni.
conoscenza di almeno un tool statistico (esempi: R, Python).
padronanza del pacchetto Office (in particolare Excel, PowerPoint).
Costituirà titolo preferenziale la conoscenza di un software per la rappresentazione dati (esempi: Power BI, Oracle Data Visualization).
Conoscenze linguistiche : buon livello di Inglese, parlato e scritto.
Completano il profilo inclinazion i a lavorare in gruppo, curiosità, spirito di iniziativa, approccio organizzato al lavoro, rispetto delle scadenze.
Sede di lavoro: Basiglio - Milano 3, partially remote

I dati richiesti verranno trattati nell’assoluto rispetto delle disposizioni contenute nel Regolamento Europeo 679/2016 (General Data Protection Regulation - “GDPR” o “Normativa Privacy”) e sue successive modificazioni ed integrazioni.
E’ possibile visionare l’informativa di Banca Mediolanum SPA, accedendo al seguente link: https://www.bancamediolanum.it/privacy/candidature .
Il Gruppo Mediolanum si impegna a garantire la parità di trattamento a tutti i candidati secondo i principi di Diversity and Inclusion.
