4411378800,https://be.linkedin.com/jobs/view/data-analysis-visualization-consultant-at-orange-business-4411378800?position=32&pageNum=0&refId=KLE0ZoS55zXfqUQ5cxz0iQ%3D%3D&trackingId=1xaNEey7MDcZITRZw87%2FyQ%3D%3D,Data Analysis & Visualization Consultant,Orange Business,"Brussels, Brussels Region, Belgium","Data Analyst
Permanent - Consultant
FR or NL + EN

Our Digital & Data team at Orange Business is a dynamic community of expert consultants revolutionizing Customer Experience, Cloud, Data, and AI across various sectors, including retail, finance, manufacturing, life sciences, and public services.
With 30 years of expertise, we continue to drive business transformation across industries by applying the latest technologies at scale in a sustainable way.

We have a significant international presence, with 20% of our activity extending beyond Belgium, and this number continues to grow. By joining us, you will be part of a global impact on businesses around the world.
Check out some of our ongoing projects:

How can a network of insurers serving multinational companies ensure effective collaboration with partners across the globe? How can it efficiently monitor client performance and identify new opportunities? At Insurope, our role is to turn data into insight and design visual dashboards that are simple, clear, and powerful, enabling Insurope's collaborators to access meaningful insights and support their decision-making in just a few clicks.

In Brussels, as in all European cities, mobility is undergoing a major transformation: less space for cars and more space for active mobility. To better manage these changes, our work at our customer Brussels Mobility involves bringing together data from private operators and public sources to visually identify problem areas and prioritize interventions.

Our customer Sappi, a global pulp and paper company, requested our help to significantly reduce energy costs and offer capacity in energy balancing markets on a daily basis. You could join the team designing and building effective interfaces and dashboards with Looker and helping to make their data usable and consumable for decision makers.
This is a great opportunity for someone who enjoys owning deliverables, working close to the business, and growing their craft in a supportive, high-standards culture.
If you want to take part in this exciting journey, please take a look at the following requirements and let’s meet if that matches your profile!
What You’ll Do:
All the responsibilities we’ll trust you with
As Data Analysis and Visualization Consultant, you’ll be at the heart of exciting projects that leverage advanced analytics and visualization tools and techniques.
Your work will help our clients optimize their business processes by giving users insights that will help steer their decision making.
Engage with clients: Interviewing and understanding your target audience to discover their needs and current challenges.
Data preparation: Sourcing and shaping the required data into a clearer and more structured format that is ready for analysis. Detecting and calculating relevant derived data insights.

Dashboard design: moving away from big lists of text and numbers to an intuitive and immersive visual design that tells a story with the data to engage the end users. Here we allow users to get insights from their data at a quick glance by using visual cues rather than sifting through a lot of information.
Collaborate and connect: Connecting business and IT to work together on enabling the setup and governance of reporting solutions.
End user support and coaching: Training & supporting end users in their self-service reporting journey.
Who you are:
What matters most for this role
Your interests & soft skills:
Interest in digital transformation and data-driven solutions
Proactive mindset and outside the box thinking to tackle challenges.
You are able to explain technical concepts to a non-technical audience.
You excel in interpersonal communication and know how to have a professional and commercial approach with customers.
You value collaboration as a way to succeed
Strong communication and presentation skills in French and/or Dutch + English
Your technical expertise:
Minimum 3 years of experience in an analytical role.
Experience with data analysis/visualization tools like Power BI, Tableau, Looker, and others.
Data Transformation and Modeling:
- You enjoy solving data transformation puzzles and shaping data.
- A good understanding of how to model data for reporting/analytical operations is essential.
Querying & data exploration skills:
- A solid knowledge of querying relational databases using SQL (SQL Server, Oracle, etc.).
- Experience with cloud-based data technologies such as Databricks, Microsoft Fabric, Snowflake, and data lake technologies such as ADLS, or similar platforms.
Business understanding & problem solving: A strong ability to think along with the business to determine what are the best insights to be found in the data.
Dashboard design:
- An affinity to understand your target audience and their information needs.
- An interest in and appreciation for good visual design and how to present data in a useful way towards the end users.
Interests and soft skills we value
What success looks like
We seek individuals who embody our values - Agile, Expert, Together, and Authentic.
You thrive on ambitious goals, collaborate openly, and make a meaningful impact with integrity.
We value professionals who combine deep expertise with a passion for learning, innovation, and exceeding expectations.
If you show initiative, accountability, and support your colleagues, you’ll flourish with us.
Excellence comes from people who lead by example and pursue personal and professional growth.
Why you should join us:
Some of the rewards of working at Orange Business

A community of experts - as Digital Natives, we put innovation at the heart of our expertise. Continuously seeking new ideas, we proudly host regular “Guild” workshops and knowledge-sharing sessions through our Data Meetups.
A place to strengthen both technical depth and professional skills (communication, ownership, stakeholder collaboration).
Exposure to real-world client contexts and business challenges where your work has visible impact.
Real opportunity to grow your autonomy and career growth possibilities.

We may work with tomorrow’s technology, but at our core we are a people-oriented organization. We value quality, feedback, continuous improvement, as much as collaboration, openness, inclusivity and well-being at work.
Hybrid way of working and modern & collaborative office in Brussels
Compelling advantages including a yearly bonus scheme, a flexible mobility with possibility for a housing budget, representation and expense allowances…
Ready to build with us?
We screen applications on an ongoing basis, with the aim of conducting conversations and interviews as we receive them.
Interested but feel that you don´t match the criteria 100%? We encourage you to apply anyway! Your perfect match might be the next job we are announcing, so why not have a head start and apply now!
Apply with your CV and (if available) links to GitHub, portfolio, or examples of work that reflect your experience.
More about Orange Business:

Orange Business is the Orange Group entity dedicated to businesses and organizations. Our unique history as a telco operator and now an IT services company enables us to support the sustainable digital transformation of enterprise businesses worldwide.

We bring the rigor of a network and connectivity expert together with the agility of a global digital solutions integrator. We combine global presence with a local approach to get the most out of digital technology, from networks and cloud to data and service platforms.

Digital & Data is the dedicated Orange Business entity for professional services in digital and data, operating as part of the Orange Business European organization. We help enterprises design, build and deliver digital and data solutions, from consulting and advisory through to large-scale implementation and managed services, combining deep technical expertise with the operational agility of a ringfenced organization. By pooling expertise across countries, we offer clients a consistent European delivery model, the ability to reuse proven capabilities at scale, and seamless integration with Orange Business' wider proposition in network, AI, trusted cloud and cybersecurity. This dedicated focus on professional services, backed by the strength and reach of Orange Business and the Orange Group, means our clients benefit from specialized digital and data expertise delivered with clear accountability, European coverage, and the assurance of a trusted long-term partner.
Check out our website for even more or connect with us on LinkedIn.

4408759361,https://be.linkedin.com/jobs/view/data-analyst-business-intelligence-at-banqup-group-4408759361?position=33&pageNum=0&refId=KLE0ZoS55zXfqUQ5cxz0iQ%3D%3D&trackingId=Qpkc474iU6NC2F8%2F3CM2Rw%3D%3D,Data analyst - business intelligence,Banqup Group,"La Hulpe, Walloon Region, Belgium","Mission

If you are ambitious, analytical, and enjoy turning data into meaningful insights, this role could be the perfect fit for you. As part of the Banqup fintech environment, you will work closely with business and technical stakeholders to analyze data, build reports and dashboards, and support data-driven decision making.

A strong command of Dutch and English is essential. We value curiosity, motivation, and a passion for data more than prior experience. In this role, you will take ownership of analytical tasks, translate business needs into clear insights, and contribute to the continuous improvement of our Business Intelligence capabilities.
Responsibilities
This is what we expect of you:
You build a sustainable relationship with our business community.
You evaluate the business needs with regard to the corporate data warehouse and data intelligence solutions.
You support the business in defining their needs for new data products like data marts, reports, dashboards, data extracts and machine learning cases for internal and external use.

You analyse and document, in collaboration with the product owners of the source systems and their development teams, the data models of the operational source systems that are used for feeding the data warehouse.
You analyse and compare the business needs against the existing data models and data catalogs.
You design and document the required changes and test the new data products to make sure they meet the required quality standards.
You help the business build reports and dashboards.
You take up an advisory and guiding role during the development and implementation of new or enhanced data products.
We are looking for candidates who have:
A Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in data, business, IT, or related field, or equivalent experience.
5+ years in data analysis and data modelling, preferably in data warehouse environments.
Experience with BI tools (Power BI, Tableau, Looker, Qlik, etc.) and dashboard/reporting development.
Knowledge of data modelling techniques (RDBMS, Kimball, Data Vault, Slowly Changing Dimensions).
Experience with ERP, CRM, or banking backoffice software.
Strong analytical skills with a focus on actionable insights.
Excellent communication and interpersonal skills for collaboration with internal stakeholders.
Organized, proactive, and results-driven, able to work independently.
Fluency in Dutch and English.
Nice To Have
Google Workspace, BigQuery, or Google Cloud Platform experience.
Knowledge of data governance practices.

We offer a market-conformed gross salary that reflects your skills and experience. Furthermore we offer an insurance package (hospitalization, guaranteed income and pension benefits) and a company car including fuel- or charging pass. We provide a net expense allowance, additional vacation days and flexible hours with home based- working possibilities to allow our employees a healthy work- life balance.

Banqup Group is offering more and more services that require a great deal of trust from our customers. As a result, all roles within any of the companies of the Banqup Group are subject to some form of a background check. For most roles, this will involve a simple identity and degree verification. For other roles, we might be required to also verify your criminal record and employment history.

Mission

If you are ambitious, analytical, and enjoy turning data into meaningful insights, this role could be the perfect fit for you. As part of the Banqup fintech environment, you will work closely with business and technical stakeholders to analyze data, build reports and dashboards, and support data-driven decision making.

A strong command of Dutch and English is essential. We value curiosity, motivation, and a passion for data more than prior experience. In this role, you will take ownership of analytical tasks, translate business needs into clear insights, and contribute to the continuous improvement of our Business Intelligence capabilities.

Responsibilities

This is what we expect of you:

  • You build a sustainable relationship with our business community.
  • You evaluate the business needs with regard to the corporate data warehouse and data intelligence solutions.
  • You support the business in defining their needs for new data products like data marts, reports, dashboards, data extracts and machine learning cases for internal and external use.
  • You analyse and document, in collaboration with the product owners of the source systems and their development teams, the data models of the operational source systems that are used for feeding the data warehouse.
  • You analyse and compare the business needs against the existing data models and data catalogs.
  • You design and document the required changes and test the new data products to make sure they meet the required quality standards.
  • You help the business build reports and dashboards.
  • You take up an advisory and guiding role during the development and implementation of new or enhanced data products.

We are looking for candidates who have:

  • A Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in data, business, IT, or related field, or equivalent experience.
  • 5+ years in data analysis and data modelling, preferably in data warehouse environments.
  • Experience with BI tools (Power BI, Tableau, Looker, Qlik, etc.) and dashboard/reporting development.
  • Knowledge of data modelling techniques (RDBMS, Kimball, Data Vault, Slowly Changing Dimensions).
  • Experience with ERP, CRM, or banking backoffice software.
  • Strong analytical skills with a focus on actionable insights.
  • Excellent communication and interpersonal skills for collaboration with internal stakeholders.
  • Organized, proactive, and results-driven, able to work independently.
  • Fluency in Dutch and English.

Nice To Have

  • Google Workspace, BigQuery, or Google Cloud Platform experience.
  • Knowledge of data governance practices.

We offer a market-conformed gross salary that reflects your skills and experience. Furthermore we offer an insurance package (hospitalization, guaranteed income and pension benefits) and a company car including fuel- or charging pass. We provide a net expense allowance, additional vacation days and flexible hours with home based- working possibilities to allow our employees a healthy work- life balance.

Banqup Group is offering more and more services that require a great deal of trust from our customers. As a result, all roles within any of the companies of the Banqup Group are subject to some form of a background check. For most roles, this will involve a simple identity and degree verification. For other roles, we might be required to also verify your criminal record and employment history.

4416398139,https://be.linkedin.com/jobs/view/senior-data-analyst-at-jobgether-4416398139?position=36&pageNum=0&refId=KLE0ZoS55zXfqUQ5cxz0iQ%3D%3D&trackingId=gqUdT2%2Bys68R2s9avoMNxg%3D%3D,Senior Data Analyst,Jobgether,Belgium,"This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Senior Data Analyst in Belgium.

This is a high-impact analytics role at the core of a fast-growing, performance-driven digital organization. You will transform complex marketing, financial, and operational data into clear insights that directly shape business strategy and decision-making. Acting as a key partner to leadership, finance, and operations teams, you will build forecasting models, reporting systems, and automated data workflows that improve visibility and drive performance. The role combines technical depth with business acumen, requiring someone who can move seamlessly between data infrastructure, analysis, and strategic storytelling. You will operate in a fast-paced, fully remote environment where ownership, precision, and scalability are essential. This position is ideal for a data professional who enjoys building systems that power real-time, high-stakes business decisions.
Accountabilities
Develop and maintain forecasting models for revenue, headcount, and business performance to support strategic planning and decision-making.
Translate historical and operational data into forward-looking insights, identifying risks, trends, and growth opportunities.
Build, maintain, and optimize dashboards using BI tools such as Power BI, Looker, Tableau, or similar platforms.
Design standardized reporting frameworks for marketing, client performance, media spend, and core business KPIs.
Automate manual reporting processes by building scalable data pipelines and integrating multiple data sources.
Manage and enhance data workflows using tools such as Supermetrics, Google Sheets, and Apps Script for seamless reporting automation.
Ensure data integrity, consistency, and quality across all reporting systems and databases.
Design and maintain structured databases to support operations, finance, and performance reporting needs.
Requirements
3-6 years of experience in data analytics, business intelligence, or similar roles, preferably in fast-paced digital, agency, or DTC environments.
Strong proficiency in SQL, Python, or equivalent tools for data analysis, querying, and pipeline development.
Advanced expertise in Google Sheets and Excel, including complex formulas, automation, and scripting (Apps Script preferred).
Hands-on experience with BI tools such as Power BI, Looker, Tableau, or comparable platforms.
Strong understanding of marketing and performance data, including familiarity with paid media platforms like Meta, Google, and TikTok.
Experience building dashboards, reporting systems, and automated data workflows from multiple data sources.
Strong systems thinking with the ability to design scalable, reliable data infrastructure rather than one-off reports.
High attention to detail with strong problem-solving skills and data accuracy mindset.
Ability to work independently in a remote, fast-paced environment with strong ownership and accountability.
Excellent communication skills to translate data insights into clear business recommendations.
Benefits
Competitive monthly compensation in the range of $2,000-$4,000 USD.
Fully remote work setup with global team collaboration.
Opportunity to work on high-impact marketing and business intelligence systems.
Exposure to large-scale performance marketing operations and datasets.
High autonomy and ownership over analytics infrastructure and reporting systems.
Fast-paced, growth-oriented environment with strong learning opportunities.
Direct collaboration with leadership and cross-functional business teams.
How Jobgether Works

We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team.
We appreciate your interest and wish you the best!
Why Apply Through Jobgether?

Data Privacy Notice: By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Senior Data Analyst in Belgium.

This is a high-impact analytics role at the core of a fast-growing, performance-driven digital organization. You will transform complex marketing, financial, and operational data into clear insights that directly shape business strategy and decision-making. Acting as a key partner to leadership, finance, and operations teams, you will build forecasting models, reporting systems, and automated data workflows that improve visibility and drive performance. The role combines technical depth with business acumen, requiring someone who can move seamlessly between data infrastructure, analysis, and strategic storytelling. You will operate in a fast-paced, fully remote environment where ownership, precision, and scalability are essential. This position is ideal for a data professional who enjoys building systems that power real-time, high-stakes business decisions.

Accountabilities

  • Develop and maintain forecasting models for revenue, headcount, and business performance to support strategic planning and decision-making.
  • Translate historical and operational data into forward-looking insights, identifying risks, trends, and growth opportunities.
  • Build, maintain, and optimize dashboards using BI tools such as Power BI, Looker, Tableau, or similar platforms.
  • Design standardized reporting frameworks for marketing, client performance, media spend, and core business KPIs.
  • Automate manual reporting processes by building scalable data pipelines and integrating multiple data sources.
  • Manage and enhance data workflows using tools such as Supermetrics, Google Sheets, and Apps Script for seamless reporting automation.
  • Ensure data integrity, consistency, and quality across all reporting systems and databases.
  • Design and maintain structured databases to support operations, finance, and performance reporting needs.

Requirements

  • 3-6 years of experience in data analytics, business intelligence, or similar roles, preferably in fast-paced digital, agency, or DTC environments.
  • Strong proficiency in SQL, Python, or equivalent tools for data analysis, querying, and pipeline development.
  • Advanced expertise in Google Sheets and Excel, including complex formulas, automation, and scripting (Apps Script preferred).
  • Hands-on experience with BI tools such as Power BI, Looker, Tableau, or comparable platforms.
  • Strong understanding of marketing and performance data, including familiarity with paid media platforms like Meta, Google, and TikTok.
  • Experience building dashboards, reporting systems, and automated data workflows from multiple data sources.
  • Strong systems thinking with the ability to design scalable, reliable data infrastructure rather than one-off reports.
  • High attention to detail with strong problem-solving skills and data accuracy mindset.
  • Ability to work independently in a remote, fast-paced environment with strong ownership and accountability.
  • Excellent communication skills to translate data insights into clear business recommendations.

Benefits

  • Competitive monthly compensation in the range of $2,000-$4,000 USD.
  • Fully remote work setup with global team collaboration.
  • Opportunity to work on high-impact marketing and business intelligence systems.
  • Exposure to large-scale performance marketing operations and datasets.
  • High autonomy and ownership over analytics infrastructure and reporting systems.
  • Fast-paced, growth-oriented environment with strong learning opportunities.
  • Direct collaboration with leadership and cross-functional business teams.

The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team.

We appreciate your interest and wish you the best!

Vous serez notamment en charge de :
Comprendre les problématiques métier,
Collecter et traiter les données en vue de l'analyse, incluant notamment la création de variables agrégées et complémentaires aux données brutes,
Automatiser et d’industrialiser les retraitements effectués sur les données,
Représenter les résultats dans un outil de restitution visuelle de façon ergonomique et intuitive,
Restituer les analyses au client notamment pas la création d’indicateurs pertinents pour les questions stratégiques des entreprises
PROFIL RECHERCHE
Diplômé d'une école d'ingénieurs ou équivalent (Bac +5), vous justifiez d’a minima 5 ans d’expérience réussis en tant que data analyst :
Vous possédez une bonne connaissance des outils et méthodologies de Data Analytics, incluant notamment des bases techniques (modèles de données, langage SQL, …) mais également méthodologiques,
Vous possédez une connaissance approfondie d'Excel et maitrisez les langages statistiques tels que R, Python ou SAS,

Une connaissance d'un logiciel ou langage dédié à la Data Visualization (Tableau, Qliksense ou Qlickview, Microsoft Power BI…) ainsi que des compétences en automatisation (VBA par exemple) seraient un plus.

Échangez avec un ou une chargée de recrutement pour un premier contact téléphonique

4410023894,https://be.linkedin.com/jobs/view/data-analyst-at-rode-kruis-vlaanderen-4410023894?position=38&pageNum=0&refId=KLE0ZoS55zXfqUQ5cxz0iQ%3D%3D&trackingId=fnTn9FNp5Bwjd%2BIJdrGu6w%3D%3D,Data Analyst,Rode Kruis-Vlaanderen,"Mechelen, Flemish Region, Belgium","Intro
Elke marketingcampagne die werkt, begint met de juiste inzichten. Bij Rode Kruis Vlaanderen speelt data een cruciale rol in de werving en de retentie van bloed-/plasmadonoren en financiële schenkers.

Als Data Analist zorg jij ervoor dat marketingacties hun doel niet missen. Met doordachte analyses, sterke doelgroepselecties en heldere rapportering lever je een directe bijdrage aan levensreddende initiatieven.
Wil jij je analytische skills inzetten in een context waar data écht het verschil maakt? Dan is deze functie iets voor jou.
Functiebeschrijving

Als Data Analist ben je binnen het marketingteam hét aanspreekpunt voor campagnes, rapportering en diepgaandere analyses. Je werkt nauw samen met collega’s van Marketing en wordt inhoudelijk ondersteund door het Hoofd CRM, Analyse & Data.
Je vertaalt marketingdoelstellingen naar gerichte dataselecties en inzichten, en zorgt ervoor dat campagnes correct worden opgezet, opgevolgd en geëvalueerd.
Wat ga je concreet doen?
Opzetten, valideren en beheren van campagnes in de CRM-tool (Dynamics D365), in nauwe samenwerking met marketingverantwoordelijken.
Ontwikkelen en onderhouden van (standaard)rapporten die duidelijke inzichten geven in prestaties en resultaten.
Uitvoeren van ad hoc analyses en meewerken aan verbeteringen in datakwaliteit en dataprocessen.
Collega’s adviseren over doelgroepselecties en datagedreven keuzes voor specifieke marketingacties.
Meewerken aan marketing en databasegerelateerde projecten, waarbij je data structureel mee helpt versterken.
Dankzij jouw werk worden campagnes relevanter, gerichter en effectiever.
Jouw profiel
Je hebt een relevante hogere opleiding afgerond en interesse in data, analyse en marketing.
Zowel junior profielen als kandidaten met ervaring in customer journeys of marketing automation zijn welkom.
Je hebt een goede kennis van SQL en Excel.
Je hebt ervaring met klantanalyse, rapportering en werken in cross functionele teams.
Je werkt analytisch, nauwkeurig en probleemoplossend.
Je kan zelfstandig werken en neemt initiatief.
Ervaring met projectmatig werken is een plus.
Je communiceert vlot in Nederlands, Engels is een pluspunt.
Extra troeven: ervaring met rapportering- of datavisualisatietools (Power BI, IBM Cognos), marketing automation suites of Dynamics D365 Customer Insights.
Ons aanbod
Bij Rode Kruis Vlaanderen kies je voor meer dan een datafunctie alleen. Je komt terecht in een organisatie waar jouw analyses rechtstreeks bijdragen aan levens redden en mensen helpen.
Wij bieden jou:
Een boeiende en gevarieerde functie waarin je impact hebt van strategie tot uitvoering.
Veel ruimte voor initiatief en zelfstandigheid, met vertrouwen in jouw expertise.
Samenwerking in een professioneel marketingteam waar data steeds meer centraal staat.
Een contract van onbepaalde duur, met stabiliteit en toekomstperspectief.
Een marktconforme verloning, aangevuld met de voordelen die horen bij Rode Kruis Vlaanderen.
De kans om je verder te ontwikkelen in marketing analytics, CRM en data gedreven werken.
Een job met maatschappelijke meerwaarde, waarin jouw werk bijdraagt aan bloed en plasmadonatie, fondsenwerving en levensreddende initiatieven.
Kortom: een rol waarin je analytische scherpte, samenwerking en maatschappelijke impact combineert, elke dag opnieuw.
Plaats van tewerkstelling
Mechelen

4245634988,https://be.linkedin.com/jobs/view/data-analyst-confirm%C3%A9-h-f-at-extia-4245634988?position=40&pageNum=0&refId=KLE0ZoS55zXfqUQ5cxz0iQ%3D%3D&trackingId=XrhyFMyErIAirl6YaH4VJg%3D%3D,Data Analyst Confirmé (H/F),Extia,"Brussels, Brussels Region, Belgium","Description Du Poste

Vous serez intégré(e) dans une équipe de consultants innovants et motivés, composée de Business Analysts, Data Scientists et Data Engineers spécialisés sur les problématiques Data Analytics. À ce titre, vous interviendrez de façon opérationnelle sur des missions de conseil autour des sujets de transformation Data Analytics, de retraitement et modélisation de données et de représentation visuelle de la donnée pour adresser des problématiques métiers.
Vous serez notamment en charge de :
Comprendre les problématiques métier,
Collecter et traiter les données en vue de l'analyse, incluant notamment la création de variables agrégées et complémentaires aux données brutes,
Automatiser et d’industrialiser les retraitements effectués sur les données,
Représenter les résultats dans un outil de restitution visuelle de façon ergonomique et intuitive,
Restituer les analyses au client notamment pas la création d’indicateurs pertinents pour les questions stratégiques des entreprises
PROFIL RECHERCHE
Diplômé d'une école d'ingénieurs ou équivalent (Bac +5), vous justifiez d’a minima 2 ans d’expérience réussis en tant que data analyst :
Vous possédez une bonne connaissance des outils et méthodologies de Data Analytics, incluant notamment des bases techniques (modèles de données, langage SQL, …) mais également méthodologiques,
Vous possédez une connaissance approfondie d'Excel et maitrisez les langages statistiques tels que R, Python ou SAS,

Une connaissance d'un logiciel ou langage dédié à la Data Visualization (Tableau, Qliksense ou Qlickview, Microsoft Power BI…) ainsi que des compétences en automatisation (VBA par exemple) seraient un plus.
PROCESSUS DE RECRUTEMENT
Échangez avec un ou une chargée de recrutement pour un premier contact téléphonique
Rencontrez un ou une Ingénieure d’Affaires (Business Manager) sur vos souhaits d’évolution
Approfondissez avec nos responsables et directeurs d’agence pour connaître la vision de l'agence

Selon votre profil, des tests ou entretiens techniques pourront vous être demandés. Tout au long du processus, vous pourrez échanger avec nos consultants pour en savoir + sur leur quotidien chez nous !
PACKAGE SALARIAL

Chez Extia Belgique IT, la transparence fait partie intégrante de l'expérience positive, voici un aperçu des éléments de package salarial dont peuvent profiter nos collaborateurs, sous réserve d'éligibilité

👛 Voiture de société ou budget mobilité ✨ Chèques repas & Ecocheque 🎁 Assurance groupe 🎉 Frais de représentation 📈 Plan cafétéria / Flex Income Plan 🚀 Primes d'apport d'affaire, de cooptation et de formation 🌍 20 jours de congés légaux + 12 jours de récupération
Ces informations sont communiquées à titre indicatif et seront abordées plus en détails lors du processus de recrutement.
LES PETITS PLUS

🎉 250 événements par an pour rencontrer tes collègues et des locaux feel good 📢 Des formations, conférences et une plateforme d'e-learning avec LinkedIn pour monter en compétences #greatplacetolearn 👩‍ Des Communautés Métiers et du Mentorat pour partager son expertise et en apprendre sur de nombreux sujets #greatplacetoshare 🕹️ Une communauté de e-sport : Extia Gaming ! #greatplacetoplay 🌏 Envie d’évoluer ? 4416653610,https://be.linkedin.com/jobs/view/online-data-analyst-at-telus-digital-4416653610?position=43&pageNum=0&refId=KLE0ZoS55zXfqUQ5cxz0iQ%3D%3D&trackingId=SklhEI%2BymdlMKatiT5%2B5kg%3D%3D,Online Data Analyst,TELUS Digital,"Brussels, Brussels Region, Belgium","Online Data Analyst
Are you detail-oriented with a passion for research and a good grasp of national and local geography? This freelance role lets you work at your own pace from home!
Role Overview:
Put your research skills to work improving the digital maps that millions of people rely on every day.

You'll conduct web-based evaluations to verify data accuracy, compare information across sources, and ensure the mapping content powering global navigation services is precise and relevant—all while working from home on your own schedule!
Requirements:
Fluency in English and French
Residency in Belgium for the past two years
Familiarity with local business, media, sports, news, social media, and culture in Belgium
Ability to follow guidelines and conduct online research
Flexibility to handle diverse tasks including maps, news, and audio
Daily access to broadband internet, computer, and relevant software
Willingness to work on a freelance basis
Recruitment Process:

To join the program, after you complete your application you will be invited to take an open book qualification exam. We will provide guidelines and learning materials in advance, and you can complete the exam at your convenience within a specific timeframe.

As part of our hiring process, candidates who progress past the initial screening and qualification stages may be asked to complete a third-party identity and background verification. This verification is conducted through a secure external provider and may require you to provide government-issued identification and other documentation at that later stage.
Please note we do not use this information to make initial application screening decisions.
Why join the TELUS Digital AI Community?
Flexibility: Work at your own pace from home
Global impact: Be part of a 1million+ strong AI Community
Innovation: Support machine learning models for world-leading brands
Growth: No previous professional experience required
Long-term opportunity: This is a part-time, long-term, independent freelance position
Equal Opportunity:

All qualified applicants will receive consideration for a contractual relationship without regards to race, colour, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, or protected veteran status. At Telus Digital AI, we are proud to offer equal opportunities and are committed to creating a diverse and inclusive community. All aspects of selection are based on applicants’ qualifications, merits, competence, and performance without regards to any characteristic related to diversity.
Apply today to join our dynamic and innovative team!

4401705755,https://be.linkedin.com/jobs/view/hr-data-analyst-at-delhaize-belgium-4401705755?position=44&pageNum=0&refId=KLE0ZoS55zXfqUQ5cxz0iQ%3D%3D&trackingId=vis50hvVYXNznslMF4opRg%3D%3D,HR Data Analyst,Delhaize Belgium,"Asse, Flemish Region, Belgium","Wat ga je doen

As HR Data Analyst, you increase insight into how our associates experience HR and our key HR KPI’s. You will help lead our HR community to drive data-driven decision making across our organization. You will design and create (where needed together with our BI or IT teams) operational/tactical metrics and dashboards that will assist in making decisions on different HR domains. You will be partnering across teams to ensure that our HR metrics are consistent and aligned to our strategic goals. You will be responsible for digging into the details to improve data quality, show new insights and make new recommendations that will impact decision making.

Profound expertise on HR data, HR reporting’s (operational & strategic) and HR dashboard(s) : With your profound expertise on HR data, reporting and dashboards you easily identify possible impacts and are able to create ad-hoc reports.
Drive data-driven decision making : You help lead our HR community to drive data-driven decision making across our organization. You provide HR related insights to our HR Community and organization.
HR Data analytics roadmap : Take ownership of our HR Data analytics roadmap by identifying, designing and deploying HR metrics and dashboards.
Stakeholder management : Identify and support stakeholders to become data-minded. Take initiatives to increase data awareness.
Predictive analytics : Co-deliver, together with the BI team, predictive analytics for HR.
Wie ben jij
You have a master degree in Econometrics, Mathemathics, Statistics, Computer Sciences or other relevant fields of study around Data, Math/Statistics.
You have a minimum of 3 years of relevant experience.
You have experience with Power BI, and ideally other data analytics tools.
Ideally, you have experience with SAP HR and SuccessFactors.
You have proven to be convincing and to be able to build trust and alignment on all levels in and outside the organization.

You should be passionate about and have experience with data and reportings and have a passion to learn and master new data analysis techniques and data science methodologies. You follow pro-actively trends in the business.
You are skilled at providing clear insights within a demanding environment.
You bring strong interpersonal communication skills.
You have the ability to work cross-functionally.
You have proven to be creative in finding solutions for complex issues with detail-oriented and simplicity mindset.
You have a strong analytical profile and ability to document requirements, functional specifications, decisions made, etc.
You have project management skills.
You manage change and drive process improvement.
You are fluent in Dutch or French, with a good knowledge of English.
Wat we bieden

Een job én een rijkelijk gevuld privéleven? Bij Delhaize kan dat. Je krijgt een aantrekkelijk loon aangepast aan jouw ervaring. Bovendien geniet je van diverse extralegale voordelen: bedrijfswagen met tank- of laadkaart binnen het federaal mobiliteitsbudget, gsm plus abonnement, netto vergoeding, jaarlijkse bonus, maaltijdcheques, uitgebreide groepsverzekering en facultatieve hospitalisatieverzekering, en uiteraard een personeelskorting in de winkel! Thuiswerk spreekt voor zich en wordt voor elke job anders ingevuld. En groeien? Dat gaat hard bij Delhaize. Door de opleidingen, op de werkvloer én via onze opleidingscatalogus, krijg je daar de ruimte voor. Doorgroeien? Ook dat kan. Vraag maar aan één van je toekomstige collega’s. Spreekt bovenstaande functie jou aan? Solliciteer dan onmiddellijk en ontdek wat jouw mogelijkheden zijn bij Delhaize!
Over Delhaize

Beter leven begint bij beter eten. Dat geloven wij bij Delhaize met heel ons hart. Daarom zetten wij ons in voor het eten op het bord van 5 miljoen klanten, elke week opnieuw. In meer dan 810 winkels kunnen Belgische en Luxemburgse klanten terecht voor een uitgebreid assortiment van meer dan 20.000 kwaliteitsproducten. Van een snelle stop in een Shop&Go, over dagelijkse boodschappen in een lokale Proxy tot een ruim aanbod binnen onze AD Delhaize's
column2: en vergeet zeker onze e-commerce diensten niet.

Maar het stopt niet in onze winkels of logistiek. Want ook onze meer dan 1000 collega's binnen Finance, HR, IT, Commerce of Legal staan staan om elkaar en onze klanten te helpen goed te eten.

4418098257,https://be.linkedin.com/jobs/view/junior-data-analyst-at-roularta-media-group-4418098257?position=45&pageNum=0&refId=KLE0ZoS55zXfqUQ5cxz0iQ%3D%3D&trackingId=Jc9%2Bi0jWXRoeZLoAUztkAA%3D%3D,Junior Data Analyst,Roularta Media Group,"Evere, Brussels Region, Belgium","Over je missie
Economische en financiële data vertalen naar betrouwbare businessinzichten.
Analyse it, optimize it! Bij Trends Business Information (TBI) maken we economische en financiële data relevant, begrijpbaar en toepasbaar voor bedrijven en professionals.
Modelleren & analyseren

Je analyseert financiële en economische datapunten en beheert het scoremodel van onze dataproducten. Je past diverse analysetechnieken toe, waaronder AI, en vertaalt resultaten naar concreet toepasbare inzichten. Je werkt mee aan de ontwikkeling en optimalisatie van modellen en begeleidt verbeteringen na implementatie.
Inzichten omzetten naar businessimpact

Je kent de data grondig en vertaalt analyses naar heldere input voor sales en klanten. Je documenteert en bewaakt KPI’s, indicatoren en performantiestandaarden. Daarnaast volg je Belgische concurrentie en internationale rapporten op en breng je relevante trends in kaart.
Samenwerken & vernieuwen
Je werkt nauw samen met Product, ICT, Sales, Marketing en Management binnen TBI. In overleg met de marketing manager lever je input voor marketing‑ en communicatiecampagnes.
Wat breng je mee
Sterke inhoudelijke expertise

Je beschikt over een degelijke kennis van econometrie, statistiek en data‑analyse en hebt ervaring met financiële bedrijfsgegevens (zoals balansen en tendensen) en B2B‑dataproducten. Je volgt de economische actualiteit en hebt interesse in innovatie binnen data en technologie
Analytische & technologische slagkracht

Je hebt affiniteit met data, ICT, sales en marketing en ervaring met zowel klassieke als AI‑gedreven analysemethodes. Je werkt vlot met tools zoals Excel en PowerPoint en voelt je thuis in analytische omgevingen
column2: je denkt digitaal en online‑gericht.

column1: Gestructureerd en met oog voor resultaat

Je werkt nauwkeurig en projectmatig aan betrouwbare data‑inzichten, functioneert zelfstandig binnen je expertise en stemt vlot af met collega’s uit verschillende afdelingen om maximale businesswaarde te creëen.
Communicatief sterk
Je communiceert helder en professioneel en beheerst het Nederlands, Frans en Engels goed, zowel mondeling als schriftelijk.
Waarom Roularta
Bouw samen aan de kwaliteitsmedia van morgen.

Bij Roularta stap je in een (media)wereld waar innovatie koning is. Je werkt er in een digitale omgeving die snel beweegt. Hier mag je springen, vallen, opstaan en weer doorgaan, want dat is hoe we samen innoveren. En met de open leercultuur van Roularta groeien je skills sneller dan bamboe.
Wees jezelf

Dat doen je collega’s ook. Geniet van de groene werkplek, afterwork drinks, een unieke blik achter de schermen van de televisiestudio van Trends Z, onze Bar Jos waar je op terras met collega's luncht en een wedstrijdje kicker. Krijg de ruimte om te groeien en nieuwe talenten te ontdekken. En speel mee in een beursgenoteerd familiebedrijf dat je bijdrage niet alleen ziet, maar ook viert.

4399538610,https://be.linkedin.com/jobs/view/hr-data-analyst-at-delhaize-belgium-4399538610?position=46&pageNum=0&refId=KLE0ZoS55zXfqUQ5cxz0iQ%3D%3D&trackingId=PoYL0lu9qNoaTXVdL6Elsg%3D%3D,HR Data Analyst,Delhaize Belgium,"Asse, Flemish Region, Belgium","Ce que vous allez faire

As HR Data Analyst, you increase insight into how our associates experience HR and our key HR KPI’s. You will help lead our HR community to drive data-driven decision making across our organization. You will design and create (where needed together with our BI or IT teams) operational/tactical metrics and dashboards that will assist in making decisions on different HR domains. You will be partnering across teams to ensure that our HR metrics are consistent and aligned to our strategic goals. You will be responsible for digging into the details to improve data quality, show new insights and make new recommendations that will impact decision making.

Profound expertise on HR data, HR reporting’s (operational & strategic) and HR dashboard(s) : With your profound expertise on HR data, reporting and dashboards you easily identify possible impacts and are able to create ad-hoc reports.
Drive data-driven decision making : You help lead our HR community to drive data-driven decision making across our organization. You provide HR related insights to our HR Community and organization.
HR Data analytics roadmap : Take ownership of our HR Data analytics roadmap by identifying, designing and deploying HR metrics and dashboards.
Stakeholder management : Identify and support stakeholders to become data-minded. Take initiatives to increase data awareness.
Predictive analytics : Co-deliver, together with the BI team, predictive analytics for HR.
Qui êtes-vous ?
You have a master degree in Econometrics, Mathemathics, Statistics, Computer Sciences or other relevant fields of study around Data, Math/Statistics.
You have a minimum of 3 years of relevant experience.
You have experience with Power BI, and ideally other data analytics tools.
Ideally, you have experience with SAP HR and SuccessFactors.
You have proven to be convincing and to be able to build trust and alignment on all levels in and outside the organization.

You should be passionate about and have experience with data and reportings and have a passion to learn and master new data analysis techniques and data science methodologies. You follow pro-actively trends in the business.
You are skilled at providing clear insights within a demanding environment.
You bring strong interpersonal communication skills.
You have the ability to work cross-functionally.
You have proven to be creative in finding solutions for complex issues with detail-oriented and simplicity mindset.
You have a strong analytical profile and ability to document requirements, functional specifications, decisions made, etc.
You have project management skills.
You manage change and drive process improvement.
You are fluent in Dutch or French, with a good knowledge of English.
Ce que nous offrons
Un emploi et une vie privée richement remplie? Chez Delhaize, c'est possible.
Vous recevrez un salaire attractif et adapté à votre expérience. De plus, vous bénéficiez de divers avantages extralégaux:
voiture de société avec carte carburant/recharge, dans le cadre du budget mobilité fédéral,
téléphone portable plus abonnement,
rémunération nette,
bonus annuel,
chèques-repas,
une assurance groupe étendue et une assurance hospitalisation facultative
une réduction pour le personnel dans le magasin!
De plus, chez nous le télétravail coule de source, son application dépend d’une fonction à une autre.
Et qu'en est-il de l'apprentissage constant? Ça va vite chez Delhaize. Grâce aux formations, sur le terrain et via notre catalogue de formations, vous obtenez l'espace nécessaire pour le faire.
Continuer à évoluer? C'est également possible. Demandez à l'un de vos futurs collègues.
La fonction ci-dessus vous intéresse? Alors postulez immédiatement et découvrez quelles sont vos opportunités chez Delhaize!
A propos de Delhaize

Mieux manger pour mieux vivre. C’est le cœur de notre engagement chez Delhaize. C'est pourquoi nous nous engageons à remplir les assiettes de 5 millions de clients chaque semaine. Plus de 810 magasins offrent aux clients belges et luxembourgeois un large assortiment de plus de 20 000 produits de qualité. Que ce soit lors d’un rapide passage dans un Shop&Go, pour des courses quotidiennes dans un Proxy local ou une offre étendue dans nos AD Delhaize, sans oublier nos services d’e-commerce.

Toute cette chaîne alimentaire commence par notre logistique. Les 2 200 collègues de nos centres de distribution de Zellik et de Ninove traitent chaque jour tous les produits provenant de nos fournisseurs, souvent situés en Belgique, et les livrent dans nos magasins via plus de 3 000 livraisons par jour.

Mais cela ne s'arrête pas à nos magasins ou à notre logistique. Car nos quelque 1 000 collègues des services Finance, RH, IT, Commerce ou Legal sont également là pour collaborer avec nous et aider nos clients à bien manger.

4402974100,https://be.linkedin.com/jobs/view/business-intelligence-analyst-at-alten-belgium-4402974100?position=47&pageNum=0&refId=KLE0ZoS55zXfqUQ5cxz0iQ%3D%3D&trackingId=2RnuO8CGnpkDp095epEfag%3D%3D,Business Intelligence Analyst,ALTEN Belgium,"Flemish Region, Belgium","Business Analyst Data & Automation - English required - ALTEN Belgium
The Position
As part of our ongoing growth, we are looking for a Business Analyst Data & Automation to join our teams and work on client projects located in Belgium.
As a Business Analyst Data & Automation, your main responsibilities will include:
Gather and analyze business requirements from stakeholders and translate them into functional and technical specifications.
Design, develop, and maintain Power BI dashboards, Power Apps, and Power Automate solutions to support business operations.
Work with SAP ECC data and data lake structures to ensure data quality, consistency, and efficient reporting.
Optimize existing tools (Excel/VBA) and drive the transition towards automated and scalable solutions.
Contribute to continuous improvement by identifying automation opportunities and accelerating delivery using Agile methodologies and modern tools.
Your Profile
Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in IT, Engineering, Business, or equivalent.
Proven experience in business analysis and stakeholder management in a data-driven environment.
Hands-on expertise with Power BI (DAX, data modeling), Power Apps, and Power Automate.
Strong knowledge of SAP ECC data and reporting logic.
Proficiency in SQL and data transformation concepts
column2: experience with data lake environments is a plus.

column1: Advanced Excel and VBA skills.
Agile mindset with experience in backlog management and iterative delivery.
Strong communication skills and ability to bridge business and technical teams.
Fluency in English is required
Working Conditions
Permanent contract with an attractive salary package
Company car with fuel card
Representation fees
Meal vouchers
Mobile phone subscription
Group insurance & healthcare insurance
Possibility of remote work
20 legal vacation days + 12 compensatory days
What we offer
Access to exciting projects in key sectors: Transport, Energy, Automotive, Telecom, Finance
A diverse client base: Collaborations with both large corporations and smaller dynamic companies across Belgium
A real career development plan: Continuous training, coaching, daily knowledge sharing
An innovative and collaborative environment
About ALTEN

ALTEN is a world leader in engineering and technology consulting, with over 57 000 employees in more than 30 countries. We support major companies in their innovation, R&D, and digital transformation projects across sectors such as automotive, aerospace, energy, finance, life sciences, and telecommunications.

Present in Belgium for over 25 years, ALTEN Belgium operates from its offices in Brussels and Antwerp. Today, with a team of 700 consultants ALTEN Belgium offers a wide range of expertise across Engineering, Life Sciences, and IT fields. From Automotive to Railway, and Medtech to Agrifood, our experts deploy their knowledge to provide innovative solutions in a dynamic and forward-thinking environment.
Ready for a new challenge?
Apply now and take part in innovative and impactful projects at ALTEN Belgium!

We combine the pace of fintech with a long-term approach to building products, teams, and careers. As a remote-first company, we give people flexibility in how they work while maintaining strong collaboration and shared ownership across teams.
🏆 In 2026, Coinspaid was recognized as Best Corporate Culture in the Blockchain Industry in Europe, reflecting our focus on ownership, trust, and collaboration.
This role will be allocated into the product department.
Product Data Analyst (Exchange & Blockchain)
Why this role stands out
For analysts who want to move beyond reporting and one-off data pulls, this role offers direct influence on product decisions and measurable product impact.
A true product-facing analytics role, not just reporting support.
Work with exchange, trading, and blockchain / digital asset data to solve high-impact analytical problems and turn insights into product improvements.
Partner closely with Product and Engineering on feature performance, execution quality, and product decisions.
Join an experienced, collaborative team with strong onboarding into the product, market mechanics, and domain specifics.
Comprehensive training in crypto and blockchain, covering all domain knowledge needed to succeed in the role.
Responsibilities:
Data-Driven Decision Support
Define and maintain key product indicators and a structured metrics tree to ensure consistent measurement across exchange and trading operations.
Prepare, visualize, and clearly present data needed for informed and timely decision-making.
Build informative dashboards and reports in Tableau for product, operational, and leadership teams.
Operational Efficiency & Quality Monitoring
Monitor product and trading performance by analyzing core metrics, feature output, execution quality, and market behavior.
Identify inefficiencies, anomalies, or risks — including suboptimal liquidity providers, algorithm behavior issues, or operational bottlenecks.
Evaluate the performance of trading algorithms and extract actionable insights to improve execution quality and profitability.
Advanced Analytical Work
Conduct statistical and quantitative analyses, including back-tests, regressions, and time-series evaluations to validate hypotheses and support product improvements.
Perform ad-hoc deep-dive analyses based on business and operational requests.
Prepare new analytical reports and implement alerting mechanisms for key metrics and deviations.
Cross-Team Collaboration
Work closely with product and engineering teams to define analytical requirements and support a data-driven approach across the organization.
Requirements:
3+ years of proven experience as a Data Analyst, Business Intelligence Analyst, or similar quantitative role.
Direct, hands-on experience (2+ years) analyzing data related to trading, exchange, and liquidity operations in financial markets (e.g., FX, Crypto, Securities, Commodities). This includes:
Analysis of Order Book data and tick-level trading data
Analyzing metrics related to execution and price quality, slippage, latency, spread, markups and trading volumes
Greatly desirable - experience with Market Microstructure concepts
Experience working in a company with product management and data-driven approach, understanding of product metrics, and participation in their development.
Technical Proficiency:
Expertise in SQL for complex querying, data extraction, and performance optimization (writing efficient queries on large datasets is critical).
Advanced proficiency in Python (or R) for data manipulation, statistical analysis, and modeling.
Demonstrated ability to create high-impact, interactive data visualizations and dashboards using tools like Tableau, Power BI, or similar.
Analytical Skills:
Strong statistical foundation and ability to apply statistical methods to product and business problems (e.g., A/B testing, back-testing, regression analysis, time series analysis).
Proven ability to identify, analyze, and interpret complex data patterns, trends, and potential issues within trading data.
Domain Knowledge:
Solid understanding of financial products and market concepts (e.g., markups management, margin, P&L calculation, bid/ask spread, market depth, execution types, etc).
Familiarity with data integrity, reconciliation, and validation processes for sensitive financial data.
Nice to have:
Quantitative Analysis Background:
Experience in developing, back-testing, or validating execution strategies or pricing models (e.g., using historical market data).
Familiarity with risk metrics specific to trading (stress testing, exposure limits).
Experience working with data from High-Frequency Trading (HFT) systems or low-latency exchange environments.
Why should you choose CoinsPaid?
You’ll be joining a company that is actively shaping its space – with enough scale to matter and enough room to make an impact.
At Coinspaid, people are expected to think, contribute, and take ownership – and are supported in doing so.
We focus on flexibility, wellbeing, and long-term growth – without overcomplicating how benefits work.
Flexible Benefits
Benefit Bar – up to €250/month
A flexible monthly budget you can use for what matters most to you – from sports and mental health to coworking, home office, or medical-related expenses.
Work & Flexibility
Fully remote work from almost anywhere
Optional offices and relocation support
Flexible, async-friendly environment
Growth & Learning
Budget for courses, certifications, and professional development
Language learning support
Cross-team learning and knowledge sharing
Wellbeing & Support
Medical insurance or reimbursement depending on location
Access to mental health support
Financial support for important life events
Extras
Merch shop with rewards system
Team offsites and company events
Sounds good? Well then, we can’t wait to see your resume!

Job Description
Position Title: Business Intelligence Analyst

column1: Cushman & Wakefield (NYSE: CWK) is a leading global commercial real estate services firm for property owners and occupiers with approximately 52,000 employees in nearly 400 offices and 60 countries. In 2024, the firm reported revenue of $9.4 billion across its core service lines of Services, Leasing, Capital markets, and Valuation and other. Built around the belief that Better never settles, the firm receives numerous industry and business accolades for its award-winning culture. For additional information, visit www.cushmanwakefield.com.
Role Purpose

As a Business Intelligence Analyst based in Brussels, you will play a key role in shaping Belgian and Luxembourg analytics offerings. Collaborating closely with local teams and leadership, you will leverage data to drive insights, enhance client value and propel our business operations forward.

Your role is nested within the larger EMEA Analytics team, ensuring synergy with a wide array of talent including data scientists and automation specialists. You will report directly to the BI Lead of the Netherlands.

You will specialise in analysing and interpreting data, providing actionable insights to inform strategic decisions for both our clients and internal operations. Your exceptional analytical skills, combined with a deep understanding of BI tools, will enable you to visualise and communicate complex data effectively. This high-visibility role is not just about analysing numbers, it's about being at the heart of innovation and playing a key role in driving significant, positive change across our organisation.
Key Responsibilities
Improve internal data processes, storage and reporting by launching BI projects and tools.
Simplify and visualize complex data through reports and dashboards.
Collaborate with the wider EMEA Analytics team to ensure alignment and best outcomes, and facilitate communication between the EMEA team and local team.
Identify successful BI initiatives from the EMEA team and scale them to Belgium and Luxembourg.
Work closely with local teams and clients, translating their needs and feedback into actionable analytics projects.
Ensure transparency and clarity in all BI projects and deliverables.
Convert strategic business inquiries into actionable insights by actively seeking out and defining necessary analytics resources and requirements.
Support business objectives by tracking KPIs and enabling smarter, data-driven decisions.
Knowledge & Experience
Fluent in English, with Dutch or French as a plus.
Bachelor’s degree in data science, computer sciences, economics or any related field.
Excellent skills and experience in data visualization tools ( e.g. Power BI or Tableau).
Good knowledge of databases, SQL and data modelling
column2: experience with Python is a plus.

column1: Proficiency with Microsoft Office applications (Excel, PowerPoint, Word) and collaboration tools (SharePoint, OneDrive, Teams).
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, able to translate complex data into actionable insights.
Familiarity with GIS tools (e.g. ArcGIS, QGIS) and spatial data analysis is a plus.
Ability to work independently, take ownership and deliver projects from start to finish.
Committed, able to work to deadlines, prioritise and juggle between tasks.
Strong communication skills to present findings and to keep communication lines open between the different teams.

We foster a culture of inclusion that embraces the unique strengths, perspectives, and experiences of all our employees. We firmly believe that our diversity enhances our team's capabilities, leading to improved decision-making, innovation, and business outcomes. If you have any reservations about applying, please don't hesitate to reach out to your local recruiter for additional information
INCO: “Cushman & Wakefield”

Des entreprises innovantes dans différents secteurs d’activité (banque, assurance, finance, industrie, e-commerce, marchés publics, trading, médical ...) et des projets à forte valeur ajoutée sur différents métiers (étude & développement, fonctionnel, agilité, infrastructure, réseaux, data, cloud ...)
🤝 Notre engagement ? Un suivi régulier, une écoute active et une véritable proximité avec nos talents.
✨ Notre promesse ? Des projets enrichissants et une rémunération à la hauteur de votre talent.

23.$.Dans le cadre du renforcement d’une équipe agile au sein d’un acteur majeur du secteur financier basé à Bruxelles, nous recherchons un(e) Business/Data Analyst & Scrum Master afin d’accompagner des projets liés à l’Investment Management et aux environnements data.
Vous évoluerez dans un contexte international, orienté données et transformation digitale, avec une forte collaboration entre les équipes métiers et IT.
🔒 Vos missions 🔒
Recueillir, analyser et formaliser les besoins métiers et fonctionnels
Participer à l’analyse de données et à la compréhension des flux backend
Travailler sur des environnements SQL, API et datawarehouse
Assurer le lien entre les équipes métiers, data et techniques
Participer à la rédaction des spécifications fonctionnelles et techniques
Accompagner les équipes dans la compréhension des enjeux data
Animer les cérémonies Agile/Scrum de la squad
Suivre l’avancement des sujets et faciliter la collaboration entre les parties prenantes
Contribuer à l’amélioration continue des processus et méthodes de travail
🧠 Le profil que nous recherchons 🧠
Expérience de 3 à 8 ans en Business Analysis / Data Analysis
Très bonne expérience en analyse de données et compréhension des environnements data
Solides compétences sur SQL, API et environnements backend
Expérience en tant que Scrum Master et/ou certifications Scrum
Bonne compréhension des principes liés à la data et aux architectures datawarehouse
Une expérience dans le secteur financier est appréciée
Une connaissance des domaines Private Banking, Asset Management ou de l'assurance constitue un réel plus
Excellente communication et capacité à interagir avec des interlocuteurs variés
Anglais courant obligatoire
Français ou néerlandais courant requis
📍 Localisation : Bruxelles
📅 Démarrage : ASAP
📄 Contrat : CDI / Freelance / Portage salarial
💡 Ce qui fait notre différence au sein de Darwin Partners 💡
Une entreprise à taille humaine et smart, avec une approche personnalisée et bienveillante.
Près de 140 collaborateurs engagés au quotidien pour des projets à fort impact.
Des missions techniques et stratégiques, où vous aurez un vrai rôle à jouer.
Un accompagnement sur-mesure, avec des perspectives d’évolution concrètes.
📌 Notre processus de recrutement 📌
1️⃣ Premier échange RH – Pour parler de vous, de vos ambitions et de nos opportunités
2️⃣ Entretien technique & fonctionnel – Échange avec un manager ou un consultant senior
3️⃣ Entretien client – Rencontre avec l’entreprise partenaire pour valider le bon fit
📩 Prêt(e) à nous rejoindre ?
N’hésitez pas à postuler directement via cette annonce en cliquant sur “Candidature Simplifiée” !

4416638394,https://be.linkedin.com/jobs/view/data-analyst-m-f-d-at-eit-rawmaterials-4416638394?position=53&pageNum=0&refId=KLE0ZoS55zXfqUQ5cxz0iQ%3D%3D&trackingId=YKR3CBFPa3S%2FnrX5pVSkGA%3D%3D,Data Analyst (m/f/d),EIT RawMaterials,"Brussels, Brussels Region, Belgium","Company Description
About EIT RawMaterials

As the world moves towards a greener future, the demand for raw materials—minerals and metals—is set to increase immensely over the next three decades. Europe faces a critical challenge in securing a stable supply of these essential resources. This challenge is where EIT RawMaterials steps in.

EIT RawMaterials is at the forefront of driving innovation and sustainability in the raw materials sector. As an Innovation Community within the European Institute of Innovation and Technology (EIT), we collaborate with over 300 partners across industry, academia, and research institutes. Together, we forge dynamic, long-term partnerships to develop innovative solutions that meet Europe's growing demand for raw materials
Position
Role Overview

The Data Analyst (m/f/d) in the Innovation and Product Development Team supports data‑driven decision‑making by transforming complex commodities and market data into clear, actionable insights. The role focuses on building high‑quality dashboards, analysing trends in minerals and metals markets, and working closely with internal stakeholders to deliver reliable reporting, meaningful insights, and self‑service analytics solutions that support innovation, strategy, and product development activities.
Tasks And Responsibilities
Data Visualisation & Reporting
Design, build and maintain interactive dashboards and reports (e.g. in Power BI, Tableau, Qlik, or similar tools) for internal stakeholders.
Translate complex commodities market data (esp. minerals and metals) into clear, user-friendly visual narratives.
Develop standardised reporting templates and data visualisation guidelines to ensure a consistent look-and-feel and interpretation.
Implement self-service BI solutions, enabling non-technical users to explore and filter data independently.
Continuously improve and iterate on dashboards based on user feedback and changing business needs.
Data Analysis & Insights Generation
Perform exploratory data analysis on commodity price data, market indices, supply-demand indicators, and other relevant datasets.
Identify patterns, trends, correlations, and anomalies in raw, advanced and critical materials markets.
Prepare ad-hoc analyses and visualisations to support strategic projects, management decisions, and external reporting.
Develop KPIs and metrics to monitor market developments and internal performance indicators.
Summarise findings in clear, concise insight reports, including visual storytelling and key messages tailored to the audience.
Data Management & Engineering Collaboration
Work closely with other teams or experts to ensure reliable data pipelines, from data ingestion to visualisation.
Contribute to the design of data models, semantic layers, and datasets optimised for BI and visualisation tools.
Help define and maintain data quality checks (e.g. completeness, consistency, timeliness) for commodities and market data.
Support integration of external data sources (market feeds, APIs, databases, files) into the analytics environment.
Document data sources, definitions, transformations and business logic used in dashboards and reports.
Stakeholder Engagement & Consulting
Act as a trusted partner for internal stakeholders (e.g. business development, strategy, innovation, procurement, finance).
Work with stakeholders to refine requirements, prioritise dashboard features, and understand decision-making needs.
Provide training and guidance to colleagues on how to interpret and use dashboards and visualisations.
Present key findings and dashboards to non-technical audiences, explaining methodology, assumptions, and limitations.
Critically review data to spot errors, inconsistencies, and anomalies in large datasets.
Collect and structure user feedback to drive continuous improvement of analytics products.
Governance, Standards & Innovation
Contribute to best practices and standards for data visualisation, data storytelling, and reporting within the organisation.
Ensure compliance with data governance, security and privacy policies.
Stay up to date on tools, methods and trends in data visualisation, BI and commodities analytics.
Prototype and test new visualisation approaches (e.g. advanced charts, geospatial visualisations, scenario simulations).
Requirements & Skills
Education & Background
Degree in Computer Science, Data/Information Systems, Data Science, Statistics, Economics, Engineering, or similar quantitative field.
Equivalent experience in data analytics and visualisation is also considered.
Professional Experience
3+ years in a Data Analyst, BI Analyst, or Visualisation-focused role.
Any consulting background would be appreciated
Experience with commodities/commodity market data, ideally in minerals or metals.
Strong background in analysing prices, indices, supply–demand, trading or risk-related datasets.
Exposure to raw, advanced or critical materials is a plus.
Proven ability to deliver business-relevant dashboards and insights.
Exposure to Market Intelligence topics is a plus
Technical Skills – Must Have
Data Visualisation: Advanced skills in Power BI, Tableau, Qlik, or Looker, including modelling and complex calculations.
Analysis & Querying: Strong SQL + experience with Python (pandas, plotly, matplotlib) or R.
Data Infrastructure: Understanding of databases, ETL/ELT, APIs, and preferably cloud environments (Azure, AWS, GCP).
Data Modelling & Quality: Ability to build reporting models and ensure data quality and validation.
Excel: Advanced user (Power Query, pivot tables, formulas).
Technical Skills – Nice to Have
Time‑series forecasting for commodity prices.
Experience with financial/market data feeds & APIs.
Geospatial visualisation skills (GIS, maps).
Familiarity with Git or collaborative development.
Understanding of risk analytics or scenario modelling.
Other Information
Additional Information & Our Recruitment Process
Commitment to Diversity: EIT RawMaterials is committed to diversity and inclusion. We encourage applications from all qualified individuals, regardless of background.
Employment Type: Temporary Position on a two-year contract with the possibility of extension.
Position Location: Germany, Belgium, Poland, Italy, Slovenia, Latvia, Finland, Greece, Hungary and Austria
The position will stay open until a successful candidate is chosen.
Application Review: Our team thoroughly reviews each application. Please make sure to submit your CV in English.
Initial Interview (30 minutes): Meet with the hiring manager and recruitment team.
Second Interview (60 minutes): Second interview with a presentation on a relevant topic to the hiring manager and the HR team.
Offer: If successful, receive an offer to join our team.

4413972084,https://be.linkedin.com/jobs/view/data-analist-financi%C3%ABn-at-stad-antwerpen-4413972084?position=54&pageNum=0&refId=KLE0ZoS55zXfqUQ5cxz0iQ%3D%3D&trackingId=lkqiAuFQ6y9e%2FZurCp77Bg%3D%3D,Data-analist financiën,Stad Antwerpen,"Flemish Region, Belgium","De stad gebruikt financiële data om de werking te ondersteunen en verbeteren. Als data-analist vertaal je die data naar duidelijke rapporten en dashboards voor collega’s. Je stimuleert zelfredzaamheid en werkt nauw samen met collega’s van verschillende afdelingen. Ben jij de analytische collega die we zoeken?
Wat doe je?
Je bouwt mee aan de vernieuwing van de rapporteringsomgeving van de bedrijfseenheid Financiën.
Je maakt rapporten. Je automatiseert de beschikbaarstelling ervan, bijvoorbeeld op vaste tijdstippen of op basis van events.
Je verzamelt informatiebehoeftes en stelt de gevraagde gegevens beschikbaar zodat de eindgebruiker de data verder kan analyseren.
Je start dashboards op en onderhoudt ze.

Je verwerft via interne training inzichten in de werking van Financiën en de beschikbare data. Zo kan je meewerken aan de uitwerking van een rapporteringsvraag. En zo kan je de juistheid van de gemaakte rapporten beoordelen.
Je denkt na over hoe we onze businessprocessen kunnen optimaliseren door gebruik te maken van data-analyse.
Je werkt nauw samen met teams van Financiën, de centrale IT-partners en stedelijke datanetwerken.
Je beheert toegangsrechten tot datamodellen en applicaties. Je bewaakt de kwaliteit, betrouwbaarheid en GDPR-compliance.
Wat verwachten we van je?
Je bent een expert in rapporten maken in een business intelligence (BI) omgeving.
Je bent goed in analyseren en verbanden leggen.
Je werkt heel goed met Excel en andere Office-programma’s. Ervaring met SAP of Microsoft Power BI is een pluspunt.
Je hebt basiskennis van financiële processen, of werkt je snel in.
Je leert graag en snel bij. Je staat open voor advies en ondersteuning.
Je werkt nauwkeurig.
Veranderingen zie je als een uitdaging.
Je herkent je in de waarden van de stad. Je wil je inzetten voor een straffer Antwerpen.
Voorwaarden
Je hebt een masterdiploma.
Je voldoet aan de sollicitatievoorwaarden van stad Antwerpen.
Wat bieden we je?
Je start bij Financiën met een contract van onbepaalde duur.
Je kan voltijds of 80% werken.
Je werkplek is Den Bell (Francis Wellesplein 1, 2018 Antwerpen).

Als je voltijds werkt, verdien je een maandelijks brutoloon van minstens 3864 euro als je geen relevante ervaring hebt, 4253 euro bij 5 jaar relevante ervaring en 4784 euro bij 10 jaar relevante ervaring. Je loonpakket kan je berekenen met de loonsimulator van de stad. Gebruik daarvoor je officiële functietitel: A1-consulent.
Je krijgt ook veel extra voordelen:
maaltijdcheques
vergoeding voor woon-werkverkeer via fiets of openbaar vervoer
hospitalisatieverzekering
tandzorgverzekering
aanvullend pensioen
vakantiegeld
eindejaarspremie
smartphone met abonnement
opleidingen
kortingen en promoties in winkels en recreatieparken
Je geniet van een goede werk-privébalans: een (voltijdse) werkweek van 38 uren met 35 vakantie- en 14 officiële feestdagen, werk in de Antwerpse regio en flexibele werkuren en thuiswerkmogelijkheden.
We leggen een werfreserve aan voor minstens 3 jaar.
We verwelkomen diversiteit. We focussen op je kwaliteiten, niet op je afkomst, religie, geboortejaar, geaardheid of beperkingen.
Selectieprocedure en -data
Een cv-screening op 3 juni.
Een adviserende psychotechnische test (abstract redeneren) thuis online, in de week voor het gesprek.
Een sollicitatiegesprek, met ervoor een thuisopdracht, op 9 juni (onder voorbehoud).
Je krijgt zo snel mogelijk je resultaat. Je kan dan een telefonisch feedbackgesprek aanvragen.
Wie deelneemt volgens de mobiliteitsvoorwaarden of al op de werfreserve staat, is vrijgesteld van bepaalde onderdelen van de selectie.
Bereid je goed voor
Onze verschillende selectiemethodieken.
Procedure en gevraagde competenties voor consulent.
Info over de stad en tips voor een goede sollicitatie.
Info over vrijstellingen.
Solliciteer nu
Solliciteer ten laatste op 1 juni 2026.
Heb je een beperking die een aanpassing vraagt aan de selectie of werkvloer? Mail ten laatste op 1 juni een kopie van je attest naar aanpassingselectie@antwerpen.be.
Als je correct hebt gesolliciteerd, ontvang je meteen een automatische bevestiging via mail.
Heb je nog vragen?
Mail naar consulent@antwerpen.be of bel ons op:
vragen over de selectieprocedure: Barbara Gregorius – dossierbeheerder – 0487 87 76 48
vragen over de vacature: Ina Van Osselaer– recruiter – 0472 66 91 00
